content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + PARTICLE + PREPOSITION + OBJECT. CanDo: Can use a limited range of verbs + particle + preposition + noun or pronoun.
chinese_human_name: 三词短语动词：动词+小品词+介词+宾语
examples: I could catch up with the work I miss after school from 3 to 4.、They interviewed and filmed pupils and teachers to find out how they get on with each other.、I'd better stop now and get on with my studying.、I think that if you want to have a peaceful holiday, you should get away from the city and enjoy the countryside, enjoy nature.、So you had better go walking or join a club, but don't forget to keep away from junk food. (Libya; B1 THRESHOLD; 2009; Arabic - Meghreb; Pass))
trigger_lemmas: catch up with、get on with、get away from、keep away from
keywords: 三词短语动词,小品词,介词,固定搭配,宾语

content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + PREPOSITION + OBJECT. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of prepositional verbs followed by noun or pronoun objects.
chinese_human_name: 介词动词：动词+介词+宾语结构
examples: If you need more information, please look at the information sheet at the entrance.、In fact, our company needs to train some staff on how to deal with the complaints of customers.
keywords: 介词动词,固定搭配,宾语,词序,动词短语

content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + PRONOUN + PARTICLE. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of phrasal verbs + object pronoun + particle.
chinese_human_name: 短语动词+宾语代词+小品词：三词结构用法
examples: I heard about this club when I was watching T.V. and I wanted to check it out.、I really like shopping for clothes, but I hate trying them on because always when I finish, the shop assistant shows me more clothes.、So, think it over and tell me what you decide to do.
keywords: 短语动词,宾语代词,小品词,三词结构,词序规则

content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + PARTICLE + OBJECT. CanDo: Can use a limited range of phrasal verbs + particle + object.
chinese_human_name: 三词短语动词：动词+小品词+宾语结构
examples: Were it not for my university, I would give up this class immediately.、I must travel to Mexico City because I won a novel contest and I need to pick up my award.、So I opened the envelope and took out the letter.、She turned off the phone and walked to the bathroom.
keywords: 短语动词,小品词,宾语,固定搭配,词序

content: Guideword: FORM: REPORTING VERBS + DIRECT OBJECT 'THAT'-CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of verbs, typically reporting or mental process verbs, with a 'that'-clause as the direct object.
chinese_human_name: 报告动词+直接宾语that从句
examples: Now you're sixteen, I totally understand that you don't want to go on holiday with your parents.、When I got there, I realised that I wasn't the only winner.
keywords: 报告动词,that从句,直接宾语,心理过程动词,句型结构

content: Guideword: FORM: NO OBJECT. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of phrasal verbs without an object.
chinese_human_name: 不带宾语的短语动词：hang out, run out, give up
examples: I needed to hang out because my life was too jam-packed and hectic.、[talking about a phone] Its battery had run out.、She cried a lot. Her feelings, emotions were all scattered. But Lisa didn't give up.
keywords: 短语动词,不带宾语,小品词,固定搭配,不及物

content: Guideword: FORM: VERBS + PREPOSITIONAL PHRASE + 'THAT'-CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use some reporting verbs with a prepositional phrase followed by a 'that'-clause as the direct object.
chinese_human_name: 动词+介词短语+that从句：报告类动词的复合宾语结构
examples: I think also that you should say to your parents that you want to try a new experience with your friends.、[about meeting a famous person] When I said to my friends that I had met with him, they didn't believe me.
keywords: 报告动词,介词短语,that从句,直接宾语,转述信息

content: Guideword: FORM: SEMI-MODAL AUXILIARY VERBS, 'USED TO', 'OUGHT TO'. CanDo: Can use semi-modal auxiliary verbs, 'used to' and 'ought to'.
chinese_human_name: 半情态助动词：used to与ought to的用法
examples: But we used to play together every single day!、I think you ought to join a gym and you should go for a walk at least three times a week.
keywords: 半情态助动词,used to,ought to,过去习惯,正式建议

content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + 'TO-' INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use a wide range of verbs followed by a 'to-' infinitive.
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 动词后接不定式：VERB + 'TO-' INFINITIVE 结构
examples: … it's one of the reasons I decided to change class.、I'm going to buy pictures to hang on the wall, because my room seems to be very cold and very unfriendly.
keywords: 不定式,动词搭配,目的表达,意图动词,B1语法

content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + '-ING' FORM. CanDo: Can use a limited range of verbs followed by an '-ing' form.
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 动词后接-ing形式：常见搭配与用法
examples: I would like to stay there a few years to finish studying and to have my own money to start thinking of travelling.、So, would you mind telling Mr and Mrs Thomas.
keywords: 动词-ing形式,固定搭配,现在分词,宾语,B1语法

content: Guideword: FORM: 'MAKE', 'LET' + INFINITIVE WITHOUT 'TO'. CanDo: Can use 'make' and 'let' + infinitive without 'to'.
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 使役动词make和let的用法：make/let + 动词原形（不带to）
examples: Let me know if it is suitable for you.、She makes me smile when I'm sad.、She always makes me laugh!、You are eighteen now, you can do what you want and they should let you do it.、I think you should talk with your parents and try to make them understand how you feel and what you prefer.、Maybe your parents are afraid of letting you go away by yourself, they still consider you their baby.
keywords: 使役动词,动词原形,不带to,make,let

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'WOULD PREFER' + 'TO', POLITENESS. CanDo: Can use 'would prefer' + 'to' infinitive, often for politeness.
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 礼貌表达偏好：would prefer + to不定式
examples: I would prefer to pay by cash.、I would prefer to meet you at six o'clock instead of four, at the café in my hometown.、I'd prefer to go on holiday with my friends.
keywords: would prefer,to不定式,礼貌表达,偏好,instead of

content: Guideword: FORM: 'HELP' + OBJECT. CanDo: Can use 'help' + object + infinitive with or without 'to', with no change in meaning.
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 动词help的宾语后接不定式：带to与不带to的用法
examples: I wanted to help him to make some friends. He's just like me.、I hope that it will help you to keep fit.、I hope my advice can help you choose where to go.、This house is terrible and I hope you can help me find something better.
keywords: help,不定式,宾语,带to,不带to

content: Guideword: FORM: VERBS + DIRECT OBJECT + 'TO' INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use some verbs of requesting and commanding followed by a direct object and a 'to-'infinitive.
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 动词+宾语+to不定式：请求与命令表达
examples: I would like you to come to a picnic on Saturday.、I would like you to come to my office on 16th of May to discuss the terms of the contract.、Your parents want you to go on holiday with them this summer.、You asked me to tell you about one of my friends.
keywords: 动词+宾语+to不定式,请求表达,命令表达,直接宾语,不定式

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THERE' + MODAL VERBS. CanDo: Can use 'there' with a range of modal verbs + 'be' + complement.
chinese_human_name: there与情态动词搭配：there will/might/could be等结构
examples: [talking about 20 years in the future] There will be flying cars and buses, and big houses.、In the countryside there wouldn’t be so many people and there is nothing to do.、In the large school there might be a lot of people that you can meet.
trigger_lemmas: there will be、there might be、there could be、there would be
keywords: there,情态动词,be动词,存在句,补语

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'There' + 'be' + 'n’t' with countable and uncountable nouns.
chinese_human_name: there be结构的否定形式：there isn't/aren't/wasn't/weren't
examples: There isn't any noise.、The spring is the best time because there aren't too many tourists.、There wasn't any message on it, just a big word "DIE".、There weren't any people on the bus she took.
keywords: there be结构,否定形式,可数名词,不可数名词,any

content: Guideword: FORM: REPORTED 'YES-NO' QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can report questions using 'ask' + 'if' or 'whether' + clause, with a pronoun and tense shift where relevant.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 间接引语：报告一般疑问句（ask + if/whether + 从句）
examples: You asked me if I like shopping.、I am asking you if we can change the time of the meeting to 5.00 pm.、A very rich movie producer asked her if she wanted to be in a movie, he said she would get paid 500,000 dollars, she agreed.、I asked her if she wanted to go and have dinner together.、Renata, a really good friend of mine, told me she was in this club, but she left it some time ago; she asked me if I was interested in joining this amazing club.、I'm writing to ask whether you're free next Saturday or not.
keywords: 间接引语,一般疑问句,ask,if,whether,时态变化,代词调整

content: Guideword: FORM: REPORTED 'WH-' QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can report 'wh-'questions using a reporting verb + 'wh-'word + clause, with a change of pronoun and tense shift where relevant.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 间接引语：如何转述特殊疑问句（wh-疑问句）
examples: I asked why she was here.、I phoned and asked what sports we could play in this club.、When we asked why they were filming our school, they said they were looking for a location where they could film some boys and girls leaving the school and so they filmed us!、He saw a guy sat there so he sat next to him and asked where the football players were.、They filmed it and interviewed a few pupils about what they think about the new swimming pool in the gym and I asked when it would be on TV.
trigger_lemmas: ask why、wonder where、inquire how、want to know what
keywords: 间接引语,wh-疑问句,报告动词,时态变化,代词调整

content: Guideword: FORM: REPORTED STATEMENTS, PRONOUN AND TENSE SHIFT. CanDo: Can report statements using a reporting clause with 'say' or 'tell' + 'that-'clause, with a pronoun and tense shift where relevant.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 间接引语：用say/tell+that从句转述陈述句（含代词和时态变化）
examples: I immediately called her to see if everything was o.k. and she said that she had won the lottery and she wanted to give some of the money to me.、He said that she was in big trouble because the phone was a bomb.、They said that our school was the most suitable school for that movie.、He said that it was his phone and he had left it in a cafe. (Uzbekhistan (Republic of); B1 THRESHOLD; 2008; Uzbek; Pass)、He said that he was a nuclear scientist and we had met before.、Mary told me that she was dating John.、In the letter, he told me that he was coming to Madrid on the first of June and he asked me if I was free.
keywords: 间接引语,say that,tell that,代词变化,时态后退

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: TEMPORAL SHIFTS, FUTURE. CanDo: Can report speech about events in the future with and without backshifts for words relating to time.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 间接引语：未来事件的转述与时态变化
examples: At the airport they told him to come the next morning.、The trainer was impressed and said that if I play next time as well as this time, I'll be the 'pointing guard' in the team.、The letter said that he is coming home next month.、Her husband told me that the following day they would return to Germany so that was the last time I saw Sara.
trigger_lemmas: said that、told me、the next day、the following week
keywords: 间接引语,时态后移,时间状语,未来事件,转述动词

content: Guideword: FORM: REPORTED REQUESTS AND COMMANDS. CanDo: Can report requests and commands with 'ask' or 'tell' + direct object and 'to-'infinitive.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 间接引语：用ask/tell+宾语+to不定式转述请求和命令
examples: She asked me to come back as soon as possible because my father is seriously ill.、As the concert finished, I heard someone call my name, I turned and there were two men from security who asked me to go up on the stage.、Dad asked me to help him at work.、He told me to go outside the concert hall and wait for him to come.、I have caught a cold and my doctors told me to rest in bed for a few days.、They told me to stay in the car and watch them and try to remember their faces.
keywords: 间接引语,ask,tell,to-不定式,宾语

content: Guideword: FORM: DIRECT SPEECH, REPORTING CLAUSE, END POSITION. CanDo: Can report speech and thought directly using the reporting verb after the reporting clause.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 间接引语：直接引语后接报告动词的结构
examples: “Excuse me Sir, but you forgot your mobile phone," she said.、"I must take it to the police station," she thought.、"Yes of course," she answered.、“What have I done?" I thought.、“What should I do?” she asked herself.、"But where is everybody? Am I alone?" I asked.、"What's your name?" he asked.
keywords: 间接引语,直接引语,报告从句,报告动词,词序结构

content: Guideword: FORM: DIRECT SPEECH, REPORTING CLAUSE, INITIAL POSITION. CanDo: Can report speech and thought directly, using the reporting verb before the reporting clause.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 直接引语转述：主句在前，引语在后
examples: He felt like a worm too and he said to me: "I'm sorry I'm not a good friend".、Maria answered "Yes!”、He answered: "Come with me".、Then I thought: "I can't stay in prison".、He asked "Are you Clarice?" I answered yes and then he told me that he was my father.、She asked me "How about we join the club?"、She thought: "Should I go to the police or should I go back?”、I thought: "Either I talk to her now or I won't be able to talk to her anytime!”
keywords: 直接引语,转述动词,主句在前,引号,标点符号

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'WONDER', REPORTED THOUGHT. CanDo: Can report thought using 'wonder' + 'wh-'word + clause, with a tense shift where relevant.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 间接引语：用wonder表达疑问想法
examples: I always had good times with her and was very impatient to read this letter: I wondered what she had written.、I really wondered who he was, but I was embrassed to look at him.
keywords: 间接引语,wonder,wh-疑问词,时态后移,疑问想法

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'OR SOMETHING ELSE', VAGUE. CanDo: Can form alternative question with 'or something else' as the second alternative to a noun phrase, to refer to something non-specific.
chinese_human_name: 选择疑问句：用'or something else'表示非特定选项
examples: Shall we buy him a book, a CD or something else?、Poetry, history or something else?
keywords: 选择疑问句,or something else,非特定选项,名词短语,开放性问题

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'OR NOT'. CanDo: Can form alternative questions using 'or not' to substitute for a clause, sometimes to express annoyance or impatience.
chinese_human_name: 替代疑问句：使用'or not'替代从句
examples: For a few seconds he was quiet. I couldn't wait, I asked nervously about his exam, did he pass or not?、Do you want to do that or not?、Do you agree with me or not?、Will you be there till that time or not?
trigger_lemmas: or not、do or not、will or not
keywords: 替代疑问句,or not,二选一提问,不耐烦语气,一般疑问句

content: Guideword: FORM: PHRASE + PHRASE. CanDo: Can form alternative questions with two phrases combined with 'or'.
chinese_human_name: 选择疑问句：用'or'连接两个短语
examples: Is this area in the city or in the countryside?、Do you feel more sympathy for your friends or your parents?
trigger_lemmas: or、prefer、feel sympathy for、in the city、in the countryside
keywords: 选择疑问句,or连接词,短语平行结构,选项提问,二选一

content: Guideword: FORM: CLAUSE + CLAUSE. CanDo: Can form alternative questions with two clauses combined with 'or'.
chinese_human_name: 选择疑问句：用'or'连接两个从句
examples: Are you still with him or did you two break up?、Should I go there and talk to her or should I stay here?、What do you think about going for walks or jogging in your breaks?
trigger_lemmas: or、should i、are you、what do you think
keywords: 选择疑问句,or,从句,省略,选项

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE MAIN CLAUSES + AFFIRMATIVE QUESTION TAGS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of affirmative tags with affirmative clauses.
chinese_human_name: 肯定句+肯定附加疑问句
examples: Your boyfriend is also 16, is he?、You bought new black clothes, did you?
keywords: 附加疑问句,肯定句,确认信息,助动词,语调

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE MAIN CLAUSES + NEGATIVE QUESTION TAGS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of 'be', 'do', 'have' and modal verb tags with negative main clauses.
chinese_human_name: 肯定主句+否定附加疑问句：aren't you? don't you? 等
examples: And so you're moving to a different area, aren't you?、You love books, don't you?、It sounds peaceful, doesn't it?、We've arranged to meet at 12, haven't we?、I think it would be fantastic, wouldn't it?、When you come back, we should rent some movies, shouldn't we?、You'll see the programme on the 23rd of August, won't you?、We could go on holiday together, couldn't we?
trigger_lemmas: aren't you、don't you、isn't it、haven't we、won't it
keywords: 附加疑问句,反意疑问句,动词一致,肯定主句,否定疑问

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE MAIN CLAUSES + AFFIRMATIVE QUESTION TAGS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of affirmative 'be', 'do' and 'have' tags with negative main clauses.
chinese_human_name: 否定主句+肯定附加疑问句：be/do/have的用法
examples: I mean, your parents don't like discos, do they?、Doesn't sound interesting, does it?、He is not important, is he?、That isn't normal, is it?、You haven't been to my house before, have you?、We haven't met each other for about 1 year, have we?
keywords: 附加疑问句,否定主句,be动词,do动词,have动词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'RIGHT' AS AN INFORMAL TAG. CanDo: Can use 'right' as a tag in informal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 非正式语境中的附加疑问词：right
examples: You are 14 years old, right?、I think you asked if I liked shopping for clothes, right?、You asked me for some help, right?、They're black, right?
keywords: 附加疑问词,非正式语境,确认信息,寻求同意,日常对话

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE QUESTIONS WITH MODALS. CanDo: Can use 'wh-'words + the negative form of modal verbs + subject + main verb to form 'wh-'questions.
chinese_human_name: wh-疑问句：情态动词否定形式的结构与应用
examples: Why can't you do both things?、Why couldn't I control myself?
keywords: wh-疑问句,情态动词,否定形式,can't,couldn't

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE QUESTIONS WITH 'BE'. CanDo: Can use main verb 'be' + 'n’t' to form negative 'yes/no' questions.
chinese_human_name: 使用be动词构成否定式一般疑问句
examples: Aren't you excited about it?、Isn't he sweet?、[talking about a cottage] Isn't it in the mountains?
keywords: 否定式一般疑问句,be动词,isn't,aren't,词序

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE QUESTIONS, AUXILIARY VERBS. CanDo: Can use auxiliary 'do' and 'have' + 'n’t' + subject + main verb to form negative 'yes/no' questions.
chinese_human_name: 否定式一般疑问句：使用助动词do/have + n't + 主语 + 主要动词
examples: Don't you think so?、Don't you like any programmes?、Don't you think she would be happy?、Don't you know me?、Haven't you seen it yet?、Haven't they got their own style?
keywords: 否定式疑问句,助动词,do,have,n't,词序,一般疑问句

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE QUESTIONS MODAL VERBS. CanDo: Can use modal verbs + 'not' + subject + main verb to form 'yes/no' questions.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词否定疑问句：wouldn't you, can't you等
examples: Wouldn't you like to come?、I'm going to a picnic next Saturday with my parents, won't you come with us?、Can't you make both?
keywords: 情态动词,否定疑问句,wouldn't you,can't you,词序

content: Guideword: USE: SEEKING AGREEMENT. CanDo: Can use negative 'yes/no' questions to involve the listener or reader by seeking agreement.
chinese_human_name: 否定式一般疑问句：寻求认同的表达
examples: Finally two days ago I found it in my pocket! It's funny! Don't you think?、They're filming a part of Harry Potter at our school, because our main building is very old. Isn't that great?、You can even just relax and sunbathe while you drink a nice, cold lemonade. Wouldn't that be amazing?、While we were there, there was also a concert and I got to see Rihanna and Chris Brown! Isn't that awesome?
trigger_lemmas: don't you think、isn't that、wouldn't that be、aren't you
keywords: 否定式疑问句,寻求认同,情感共鸣,互动表达,一般疑问句变体

content: Guideword: FORM: + 'OF YOURS'. CanDo: Can use the possessive pronoun 'yours' after noun + 'of'.
chinese_human_name: 名词+of yours：所有格代词yours的特殊用法
examples: Maybe you can take a friend of yours with you there.、I think that it's a very good idea of yours to come to the UK. (Skills for Life (Entry 3); Spanish)、You can ask some friends of yours to join you.
trigger_lemmas: a friend of yours、an idea of yours、some friends of yours、that car of yours
keywords: 所有格代词,yours,名词+of,所属关系,非正式用法

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPARATIVE CLAUSES WITH 'MINE', 'YOURS'. CanDo: Can use the possessive pronouns 'mine' and 'yours', with singular reference, in comparative clauses after '(not) as … as'.
chinese_human_name: 比较从句中的物主代词：mine和yours在as...as结构中的用法
examples: Hope you have a friend as good as mine!、My bedroom is not as big as yours but it is lovely.、My town isn't very big, so I think it won't grow as fast as yours.、I hope […] my English becomes as good as yours.
trigger_lemmas: as good as、as big as、as fast as、not as...as
keywords: 物主代词,mine,yours,比较从句,as...as结构

content: Guideword: General comment. CanDo:
chinese_human_name: 物主代词：表示所有关系的代词用法
keywords: 物主代词,形容词性物主代词,名词性物主代词,所有关系,人称一致

content: Guideword: FORM: 'YOURS' AS SUBJECT. CanDo: Can use the possessive pronoun 'yours', with singular reference, in subject position.
chinese_human_name: 物主代词'yours'作主语：单数指代用法
examples: We bought it because yours is very old and sometimes stops working.、I really needed some extra information, and yours was very useful.
keywords: 物主代词,主语位置,单数指代,避免重复,动词一致

content: Guideword: FORM: SAME SUBJECT AND OBJECT, SINGULAR. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of singular reflexive pronouns with an increasing range of verbs to refer to actions where the subject and object of the verb are the same.
chinese_human_name: 单数反身代词：主语与宾语相同时的用法
examples: I decided to talk to him and introduce myself.、First you should ask yourself if you have enough money for the journey.、Lisa told herself to be strong and hoped everything would be alright.、I was really surprised when I read the e-mail. It was from someone who calls himself  the black shadow.
keywords: 反身代词,主语宾语一致,单数形式,及物动词,自我指代

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'BY' + SINGULAR. CanDo: Can use the singular reflexive pronouns 'myself', 'yourself', 'himself' and 'herself' with 'by' to mean alone, without any help.
chinese_human_name: 反身代词与by搭配：表示独自完成
examples: I will ask my friends from the class and I will study by myself.、You can do some exercise by yourself.、He tried to open it by himself.、She decided to find him by herself.
keywords: 反身代词,by,独自,独立完成,myself,yourself,himself,herself

content: Guideword: FORM: SINGULAR, AFTER PREPOSITIONS. CanDo: Can use the singular reflexive pronouns 'myself', 'yourself', 'himself' and 'herself' after prepositions where the object of the preposition is the same as the subject of the verb.
chinese_human_name: 介词后的单数反身代词：myself, yourself, himself, herself
examples: He told me about himself and how he started playing the guitar.、Now she was very proud of herself.
keywords: 反身代词,介词宾语,主语一致,反射动作,单数形式

content: Guideword: USE: SINGULAR, FOR EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use the singular reflexive pronouns 'myself', 'yourself', 'himself' and 'herself' for emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 反身代词强调用法：myself, yourself, himself, herself
examples: The best solution will be if you decide yourself what to do.、I think it was the director himself who guided the actress through our wonderful school gardens to film the opening scene there.、The food was delicious, especially the cake, which Sandra had cooked herself.
trigger_lemmas: decide yourself、cook herself、guide himself、do it myself
keywords: 反身代词,强调用法,myself,yourself,himself,herself,亲自

content: Guideword: FORM: (SUBJECT) USING 'IT' TO INTRODUCE. CanDo: Can use dummy 'it' as a subject to introduce something the speaker or writer is going to refer to.
chinese_human_name: 形式主语it：用于引出话题的虚拟主语
examples: It is best to spend your time in the countryside.、It's boring to be at home when you have a lot of free time.、It's normal that your parents want you to go with them.
keywords: 形式主语it,虚拟主语,不定式短语,that从句,句型结构

content: Guideword: USE: 'THIS', ALREADY MENTIONED. CanDo: Can use 'this' as a pronoun to refer back to whole clauses or sentences, especially to highlight or continue an important topic.
chinese_human_name: 指示代词'this'：回指前文句子或从句
examples: To stay fit I'm eating lots of fruit and vegetables, but meat and fish, too. I think you should do this, too, if you haven't done it in the past.、People usually don't care about the cost. Because of this, weddings are more amazing.、My room seems to be very cold and very unfriendly. I think flowers and pictures change this.、Our department currently has a lot of work to do, because there are so many conferences to arrange, and it needs a person to be in charge of this.
trigger_lemmas: because of this、do this、change this、in charge of this
keywords: 指示代词,回指,连贯性,强调功能,话题延续

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THOSE'. CanDo: Can use 'those' as a pronoun with plural reference.  ►  noun phrases
chinese_human_name: 指示代词'those'的复数用法：指代前文提到的复数名词
examples: Most of my clothes are lemon, green or orange, those are my favourite colours!、Well, those are my ideas but you are the ones that are coming, and maybe you don't like the countryside.
keywords: 指示代词,复数指代,those,代词用法,避免重复

content: Guideword: USE: 'THOSE', ALREADY MENTIONED. CanDo: Can use 'those' as a pronoun to refer to things which have already been mentioned.  ►  noun phrases
chinese_human_name: 指示代词'those'：指代已提及事物的用法
examples: Those are the things I like the most about her.、I don't really think I'd move, but if I had to, I would love to live in a city like Paris or Rome. I'm very keen on cities like those.
keywords: 指示代词,those,已提及事物,复数名词,替代用法

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THESE'. CanDo: Can use 'these' as a pronoun with plural reference.  ►  noun phrases
chinese_human_name: 指示代词'These'的复数用法：指代多个事物
examples: These are the most important years for us as teenagers, and they have to be the best years!、These are the main things that I can tell you.
trigger_lemmas: these are、these are the、these are my、these are important
keywords: 指示代词,复数形式,These are,指代对象,近指

content: Guideword: USE: 'THESE', ALREADY MENTIONED. CanDo: Can use 'these' as a pronoun to refer to something with immediate relevance which has already been mentioned.  ►  noun phrases  ►  pronouns: demonstrative
chinese_human_name: 指示代词these：指代已提及的相关事物
examples: He is very clever and generous, and these are the things that I like most about him.、There are a few interesting and funny programmes like The Simpsons, Password or José Mota's hour. These are the only programmes I like watching.、I think that we have similar taste about things like these.
keywords: 指示代词,these,已提及,复数指代,语境相关

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THIS ONE', 'THAT ONE' SUBSTITUTION. CanDo: Can use 'this one', 'that one' as a substitute for countable singular nouns that have previously been mentioned.
chinese_human_name: 指示代词替代用法：this one/that one 替代可数单数名词
examples: I don't usually wear dresses but I had to buy this one because I am going to be in a singing competition.、[talking about a film] I have chosen that one because of my father and brother, they also like it.
keywords: 指示代词,可数单数名词,替代用法,this one,that one

content: Guideword: FORM: MODIFYING. CanDo: Can use quantifying determiners + 'of' with demonstrative pronouns  ► determiners: demonstrative
chinese_human_name: 指示代词与量化限定词+of的搭配用法
examples: If you can't, you must choose one of these.、And we have to go to Sydney to see all of that.、There are a lot of programmes in my country, but only some of these are interesting.
keywords: 指示代词,量化限定词,of结构,部分与整体,数量表达

content: Guideword: FORM: SUBJECT AND OBJECT PRONOUNS, 'BOTH', 'A FEW', 'ANOTHER'. CanDo: Can use 'both', 'a few', 'another' as subject and object pronouns.
chinese_human_name: 数量代词：both、a few、another作主语和宾语
examples: [talking about two types of exercise] Both are going to keep you fit.、Both are very good films.、About going to the city or to the countryside, I think you'll enjoy both.、I am happy to select a few.、Well, in my country there are lots of programmes but only a few are interesting.、Moving from an area to another is not very simple, but there isn't a problem without a solution.
keywords: 数量代词,both,a few,another,主谓一致

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'OF' + OBJECT PRONOUN. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of pronouns ('some', 'a few', 'any', 'each') with 'of' followed by an object pronoun.
chinese_human_name: 数量代词与'of'加宾语代词连用：some of them, any of us等
examples: Of course some of them are closer than others but I love them all.、I have shot many photos with my new digital camera and I will send some of them by e-mail for you.、Children my age are playing too long with their computers.... But only a few of them.、So travelling is not at all a problem for any of us.、Please ensure each of them has a computer, and they can practise for at least half an hour after class.
trigger_lemmas: some of、a few of、any of、each of
keywords: 数量代词,宾语代词,of介词,部分表达,群体指代

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THIS ONE', 'THAT ONE'. CanDo: Can use 'this one', 'that one' to refer to a singular countable noun.  ►  pronouns: demonstratives
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: substitution, one, ones, none
chinese_human_name: 指示代词替换：this one与that one的用法
examples: I met many old friends there, because I was in another judo club before this one and my friends and I left the old one to join the 1.JCF, because we heard that this one is the best in the whole of Frankfurt.、I'm thinking about buying a new desk because this one is very old.、I choose that one, because it is a very good and quiet place.、This is the only part of "Harry Potter" movies which I don't have, and it's my favourite, so I'm going to buy that one.
keywords: 指示代词,单数可数名词,替代用法,this one,that one

content: Guideword: FORM: 'WHICH ONE'. CanDo: Can use 'one' after 'which' in indirect questions to refer to one of two or more options.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: substitution, one, ones, none
chinese_human_name: 间接疑问句中的替代词：which one
examples: If you ask me which one I would choose, I would first go camping and then to Disneyland in Paris.、First of all, you should think of all the advantages and disadvantages of each option and if you want, you can write them on a piece of paper. This way you see which one is the best.
trigger_lemmas: which one、ask which one、see which one、know which one
keywords: which one,间接疑问句,替代词,选项指代,避免重复

content: Guideword: FORM: 'ONES'. CanDo: Can use 'ones' as a pronoun to substitute for plural nouns which have already been mentioned or are obvious from the context.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: substitution, one, ones, none
chinese_human_name: 代词替换：用'ones'替代已提及的复数名词
examples: My pillows are getting old and I need new ones.、To tell the truth, I prefer large schools to small ones.、We also need new armchairs, because a lot of the old ones are broken.
keywords: 代词,复数名词,替代,形容词,简洁表达

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PREMODIFIER + 'ONES', GENERAL REFERENCE. CanDo: Can use premodifiers with 'ones', to refer to something in general.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: substitution, one, ones, none
chinese_human_name: 代词替换：使用前置修饰语+ones进行泛指
examples: Our computers are out-dated and slow. I think we should replace them with new ones.、Large schools are usually better than small ones, because they offer more interesting activities.
keywords: 代词替换,ones,前置修饰语,泛指,可数名词复数

content: Guideword: FORM: PRE-MODIFYING. CanDo: Can use determiners + premodifers + 'ones'.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: substitution, one, ones, none
chinese_human_name: 代词替代：使用限定词+前置修饰语+ones
examples: We should buy some new copiers and some new faxes because the old ones are very slow, and one copier is already broken.、I have seen many programs recently, but the ones that I liked best are the funny ones, and the science-fiction ones, because I like things that are unreal.、I also like watching films on Friday nights, there are some good ones on the first channel.、I've bought five new t-shirts, because I don't like my old ones anymore.
keywords: 代词替代,ones,限定词,前置修饰语,复数可数名词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: POSTMODIFYING, SPECIFYING. CanDo: Can use 'the ones' with a complement, to refer to something specific.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: substitution, one, ones, none
chinese_human_name: 代词替代：用'the ones'后接补语指代特定事物
examples: Weddings in our country? Well, they're pretty different from the ones in England.、Evil people, like the ones who did this, should die, or at least go to prison.、The products we received were not exactly the ones we ordered.
trigger_lemmas: the ones in、the ones who、the ones we
keywords: 代词替代,the ones,补语,指定,复数名词

content: Guideword: FORM: OBJECT OR COMPLEMENT. CanDo: Can use a wide range of indefinite pronouns as objects or complements.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 不定代词作宾语或补语：-thing、-one、-body等
examples: I often watch TV, because my computer is broken and I have nothing to do. (Georgia (Republic of); B1 THRESHOLD; 2007; Georgian; Pass)、… there was nothing on the wall.、It's a tennis club and the people there were all strangers for me, I didn't know anyone.、When I arrived at his house there wasn't anyone there.、He went everywhere in the world!
trigger_lemmas: have nothing to do、there is nothing、don't know anyone、go everywhere
keywords: 不定代词,宾语,补语,there be句型,否定句

content: Guideword: FORM: SUBJECT. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of indefinite pronouns ('something', 'nobody') as subjects, with a singular verb.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 不定代词作主语：something、nobody等与单数动词的搭配
examples: I was so confused that I thought something was happening.、Unfortunately something has happened with the airplane's schedule, so I won't be able to arrive at 1.15 pm, as we agreed.、So I tried to call for help, but nobody answered.
keywords: 不定代词,单数动词,主语一致,something,nobody

content: Guideword: USE: 'ONE', GENERAL, FORMAL. CanDo: Can use 'one' to refer to people in general, in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 代词'one'的泛指用法：正式语境中泛指人
examples: The television, I think, is like a box where one can find anything: rubbish and good things.、One more reason I like Singapore is that one sees cats everywhere.
keywords: one,泛指,正式语境,第三人称单数,客观表达

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PREMODIFIERS, INTENSIFYING. CanDo: Can use premodifiers with indefinite pronouns, often to intensify.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 不定代词前置修饰语：强化表达
examples: You can find absolutely anything, whatever you need.、I like to wear a T-shirt with jeans almost everywhere I go.、Nearly everyone I know sits at a computer all day.
keywords: 不定代词,前置修饰语,强化表达,almost,absolutely

content: Guideword: FORM: 'EACH OTHER'. CanDo: Can use 'each other' as the object of a verb or complement of a preposition to talk about the mutual behaviour of two or more people.
chinese_human_name: 相互代词：each other的用法
examples: We go to the same school so we see each other every day.、First, we had to introduce each other by saying where we come from, which kind of job we are doing here, why we want to learn English.、He said the coach is really nice and that the first players get on well with each other.、We didn't use to talk to each other, but one day we started to talk and I discovered she was extremely friendly and nice.
trigger_lemmas: see each other、talk to each other、help each other、get on with each other
keywords: 相互代词,each other,动词宾语,介词补语,双向动作

content: Guideword: USE: TEMPORARY REPEATED ACTIONS. CanDo: Can use the present continuous to describe temporary actions which are repeated or regular.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时：描述临时重复或规律性动作
examples: I'm doing a lot of great leisure activities.、[talking about an interactive internet game which is played over a period of time] I'm playing this exciting game called Diner Dash; it's about making a restaurant.、I have to go to the doctor because I'm having some problems.
trigger_lemmas: these days、this week、at the moment、for now
keywords: 现在进行时,临时重复动作,动词-ing形式,时间状语,动态动词

content: Guideword: USE: TEMPORARY SITUATIONS. CanDo: Can use the present continuous with a wide range of verbs to talk about temporary situations.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时：描述临时性情境
examples: I'm enjoying a sunny day, much better than England.、Now, I'm in a hotel, here in the centre of Madrid, and it's raining a little bit.
keywords: 现在进行时,临时性情境,状态动词,时间状语,动词-ing形式

content: Guideword: USE: EVENTS IN PROGRESS. CanDo: Can use the present continuous with a wide range of verbs to talk about situations and events in progress.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时：描述正在进行的动作和事件
examples: I’m planning a picnic on Saturday in the park.、I’m expecting my cousin to visit me.、I think I am falling in love.
keywords: 现在进行时,动词-ing,进行中动作,时间状语,am/is/are

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NEGATIVE TAG QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'don't you think' or 'don't you agree' to look for agreement or an opinion.
chinese_human_name: 寻求认同的反意疑问句：don't you think/agree
examples: It's a bit strange, don't you think?、I think it’s the best way, don’t you agree?、The surprise will be even bigger if I wait. Don't you think so?
trigger_lemmas: don't you think、don't you agree、don't you think so
keywords: 反意疑问句,寻求认同,don't you think,don't you agree,日常对话

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'yes/no' and 'wh-' question forms with a wide range of subjects.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时疑问句：Yes/No与Wh-问句的构成与应用
examples: Does your brother go with your parents?、Which programmes do we like to watch?、Where do they want to spend their holidays?、How does he know my name?
keywords: 一般现在时,疑问句,Yes/No问句,Wh-问句,助动词do/does

content: Guideword: USE: MENTAL PROCESS VERBS. CanDo: Can use the present simple with an increasing a range of mental process verbs, including 'remember', 'understand', 'believe'.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时：心理过程动词的用法
examples: I'm reading an adventure book, I don't remember the title but it's very boring!、Well, I totally understand that you want to go somewhere with your friends.
keywords: 一般现在时,心理过程动词,remember,understand,believe

content: Guideword: USE: SPEECH ACT VERBS. CanDo: Can use the present simple with a limited range of speech act verbs, including 'suggest', 'apologise', 'recommend'.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时与言语行为动词：suggest、apologise、recommend
examples: I suggest that if you travel, you should pay for your trip.、I apologise for missing your class.、For these reasons, I definitely recommend staying in a city.
keywords: 一般现在时,言语行为动词,suggest,apologise,recommend,that从句,for短语,动名词

content: Guideword: USE: REPORTING VERBS. CanDo: Can use the present simple with a limited range of reporting verbs, including 'say', 'show'.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时与报告动词搭配：say、show等
examples: For example, I know a person that moved to my city two years ago, and now he says that it improved his social life.、The movie shows how a pretty woman with all the problems you can imagine can do different things to make people feel better.
keywords: 一般现在时,报告动词,say,show,that从句,转述,客观陈述

content: Guideword: FORM: SIMPLE. CanDo: Can use a wide range of simple (single word) prepositions.
chinese_human_name: 简单介词：表示时间、地点、方向的单词语法
examples: If it is raining, the rain enters through the holes in the roof and makes the house wet.、To my surprise, there was a charming beach along the cycle route.、Don't forget to meet me at the theme park beside the main entrance.、In the middle of the room there is a big bed between two windows and above the bed there is a beautiful painting.、I think Bremen won't change that much within the next 20 years.、I hate shopping via the internet.
keywords: 简单介词,介词短语,时间介词,地点介词,方向介词

content: Guideword: FORM: STRANDING. CanDo: Can end a reported question clause and a relative clause with a preposition, where the preposition is stranded from its complement. ► Clauses: relative
chinese_human_name: 介词悬置：在间接疑问句和关系从句中末尾使用介词
examples: So this is the best festival I been to.、Please give him all the information he asks for.、Everybody should see which company I work for.
trigger_lemmas: ask for、work for、been to、talk to、interested in
keywords: 介词悬置,关系从句,间接疑问句,关系代词,动词+介词组合

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPLEX. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of complex prepositions.
chinese_human_name: 复杂介词短语：instead of, thanks to, due to等
examples: My parents weren't happy when they heard that I wanted to go to Croatia with my friends instead of flying to the USA.、The company chose my school thanks to the excellent results of the students.、It was saying that some company can find me a job in the UK and I can earn up to £ 1000 per month.、[talking about a watch] I was going out of the shop when I noticed that I had lost it.、I would like to apologise because, due to a dental appointment, I will not be able to participate in the English class tomorrow.、The best place to stay is a hotel a bit outside of the city.
trigger_lemmas: instead of、thanks to、due to、up to、out of
keywords: 复杂介词,固定搭配,介词短语,原因表达,替代关系

content: Guideword: FORM: 'ADVERB' + PREPOSITION. CanDo: Can use adverbs of degree to modify prepositions and prepositional phrases.
chinese_human_name: 程度副词修饰介词短语：quite near, right behind, really like
examples: It's quite near my house so I can go there easily.、When I was trying to reach the only frame of light I could see in the woods, something moved right behind me.、I'm going to put it right in front of the window, so I have enough light.、I felt I was flying and it was really like a dream.、But anyway it's enjoyable to shop for clothes  especially with a group of friends.
keywords: 程度副词,介词,介词短语,修饰,词序

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form.
chinese_human_name: 过去进行时疑问句：was/were + 主语 + doing
examples: Was my mother going to die?、I couldnt see anybody, then there he was, my hero, my favorite singer Bob Dylan saying my name, but was he calling me?、What were you doing? (Uzbekhistan (Republic of); B1 THRESHOLD; 2009; Russian; Pass)、[talking about a dream] Everything was strange. Why was I following a green fox?
keywords: 过去进行时,疑问句,was/were,动词-ing,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use the past continuous with an increasing range of adverbs in the normal mid position.
chinese_human_name: 过去进行时与副词搭配：中位副词的使用
examples: He was still waiting at the traffic light.、He was actually acting like a ghost.
keywords: 过去进行时,副词,中位位置,was/were,现在分词

content: Guideword: USE: REASON. CanDo: Can use the past continuous to give a reason for something, often with 'because'.
chinese_human_name: 过去进行时：用because表达原因
examples: Because she was sitting in the corner, she could see the whole view of the café in front of her.、Yesterday a TV company came to my school because they were doing a science quiz.
keywords: 过去进行时,because,原因解释,持续动作,背景信息

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form.
chinese_human_name: 过去进行时否定形式：was/were not + 现在分词
examples: He was not planning to become a professional player.、She was not feeling very well.、I tried to phone her house, but her phone wasn't working.、I'm writing you this letter to tell you that we felt so bad when we heard you weren't working at the school any more.
keywords: 过去进行时,否定形式,was not,were not,现在分词

content: Guideword: USE: REPEATED EVENTS. CanDo: Can use the past continuous to talk about ongoing repeated events in the past, often with 'always'.
chinese_human_name: 过去进行时：表示过去重复发生的持续性事件
examples: Worst of all, in September it was always raining.、He was always talking about this prize but I never thought he would win it.
keywords: 过去进行时,重复事件,频率副词,情感表达,was/were + 动词-ing

content: Guideword: USE: BACKGROUND EVENTS. CanDo: Can use the past perfect continuous talk about a background action or event which began before a point in the past and was still continuing up to a point in the past when the main event happened.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 过去完成进行时：描述过去背景事件
examples: I had been waiting for this letter for months, so I opened it immediately.、Once I had been watching TV for 6 hours when my Mum suddenly switched it off.
trigger_lemmas: had been waiting、had been watching、for months、for hours
keywords: 过去完成进行时,背景事件,持续性动作,时间状语,had been doing

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 过去完成进行时：肯定形式
examples: I had been working on the project for over a year.、We had been waiting for hours.、I didn't need so much, because I'd been saving money for a few months.
keywords: 过去完成进行时,肯定形式,had been,动词-ing,持续时间

content: Guideword: USE: CONTINUING EVENTS IN THE PAST. CanDo: Can use the past perfect continuous to talk about an action or event which began before a point in the past and was still continuing up to that point, often with 'for' or 'since', to give background information.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 过去完成进行时：描述过去某点前持续进行的动作
examples: I know it very well because we had been exchanging letters for a long time.、She had been going there since she was ten years old.、He began to think about his own thoughts while he was smoking a cigarette (he had been smoking since he was a child, since he was 12), when suddenly the curtain moved.
keywords: 过去完成进行时,持续动作,背景信息,for,since

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use negative forms.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时否定形式：had not + 过去分词
examples: The ABC Company called this morning to say that our company had not delivered the goods on time.、I hadn't heard from her for two months.
keywords: 过去完成时,否定形式,had not,hadn't,过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时肯定式：had + 过去分词
examples: I felt really sorry for you after I had read your last letter.、[…] I'd forgotten that I have an appointment with the doctor […]
keywords: 过去完成时,had,过去分词,时间顺序,肯定式

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use the past perfect simple with a limited range of adverbs (including 'never', 'ever', 'just', 'always', 'already') in the normal mid-position. ► adverbs
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时与副词搭配：never/ever/just/always/already
examples: It was the most beautiful one I had ever seen.、So, she came to America to see a relation she had never seen before, and she spent the money with me.、I had just arrived from school when I saw the letter.、I had always wanted to visit European cities and Paris was one of the easiest cities to get to from England.
trigger_lemmas: had never seen、had ever seen、had just arrived、had always wanted
keywords: 过去完成时,副词,mid-position,时间顺序,had never seen

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: AFTER 'IF' CLAUSES. CanDo: Can use the past perfect simple in 'if'-clauses to talk about imagined situations in the past, often with regret. ► 'if'-clauses
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时在if条件句中的用法：表达对过去的假设与遗憾
examples: If the weather had been better, we would have enjoyed it more.、If you had gone there with me, you would have been happy.、So I decided to go back and look for them in the park: believe it or not I would have spent all night in the park, if it hadn't been closed since six o'clock!
keywords: 过去完成时,if条件句,假设语气,遗憾表达,would have

content: Guideword: USE: TIME UP TO THEN. CanDo: Can use the past perfect simple to talk about a time before another time in the past.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时：表示过去某时间之前已完成的动作
examples: He then thought how stupid he had been.、Actually I'd arranged an appointment with my doctor before calling you.
keywords: 过去完成时,had + 过去分词,时间先后,before,after

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form with a wide range of verbs.
chinese_human_name: 一般过去时肯定式：动词过去式的构成与使用
examples: I convinced some of my friends to come with me even if they don't like rap music.、Previously I faced many failures but I never gave up.、The cameraman filmed us during a lesson and later, walking to the playground.
keywords: 一般过去时,肯定式,动词过去式,规则变化,不规则动词,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form with an increasing range of verbs.
chinese_human_name: 一般过去时否定形式：didn't + 动词原形
examples: I didn't realise I had lost the ring till I was at home.、I didn't trust him.、[talking about a spare television] … we had one in the garage that we did not use.
keywords: 一般过去时,否定形式,did not,didn't,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: HABITUAL STATES OR ACTIONS. CanDo: Can use the past simple to talk about habitual states or actions.
chinese_human_name: 一般过去时：描述过去的习惯性状态或行为
examples: … he always seemed so confident to me!、… we always talked during the class.
keywords: 一般过去时,习惯性行为,频率副词,动词过去式,时间状语

content: Guideword: USE: ORDERING OF PAST EVENTS. CanDo: Can use the past simple to order sequences of events in the past, in the context of narratives.
chinese_human_name: 一般过去时：按时间顺序叙述过去事件
examples: I remember her as a shy girl, but I read she became a manager, she went on lots of trips, she met a lot of new friends, she got married and then she got divorced.、We met at 9 in the morning and decided to go to the seven lakes, a very wonderful place not far from the centre of the town: lots of trees, lots of flowers and very fresh air.、We waited for the suitcase for two days and then we bought new dresses.
keywords: 一般过去时,时间顺序,叙事,动词过去式,时间连接词

content: Guideword: USE: REGRET. CanDo: Can use the past simple with 'wish (that)' to express regret that things are not different.
chinese_human_name: 过去简单时与wish连用：表达对现状的遗憾
examples: I wish that you were here, cycling with us.、I wish you were here with me. I wish we were together.、I wish weekends lasted five days.
keywords: wish,过去简单时,遗憾,虚拟语气,were

content: Guideword: USE: IMAGINED SITUATIONS AFTER 'IF'. CanDo: Can use the past simple after 'if' to talk about the possible result of an imagined situation in the present or future.
chinese_human_name: 条件句中的过去简单时：if引导的假设情境
examples: It would be better if you spent some time in the fresh air with your friends or walking in a park.、If you wanted to do some outdoor activities, we could go fishing or even walking through the green fields.
keywords: 过去简单时,非真实条件句,if引导,would/could/might,假设情境

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'yes/no', 'wh-', tag and negative question forms with a limited range of verbs.
chinese_human_name: 过去时一般疑问句：四种疑问形式（一般疑问句、特殊疑问句、反意疑问句、否定疑问句）
examples: Did you receive my present?、How did you spend your weekend? (Uzbekhistan (Republic of); B1 THRESHOLD; 2009; Russian; Pass)、Why didn't he call me?、We arranged to meet each other next Tuesday at 11 o'clock, didn't we?、Didn't you spend your last holiday with them as well?
keywords: 过去时,一般疑问句,特殊疑问句,反意疑问句,否定疑问句

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form with a limited range of verbs.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 现在完成进行时疑问句：Have you been doing?
examples: Have you been thinking about it a lot?!、What have you been doing?、[talking about musical instruments] … how long have you been playing them?
keywords: 现在完成进行时,疑问句,持续性动作,have been doing,how long

content: Guideword: USE: REPEATED CONTINUING EVENTS. CanDo: Can use the present perfect continuous to talk about repeated activities which began in the past and are still continuing.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 现在完成进行时：谈论从过去开始并持续至今的重复活动
examples: I've been watching TV a lot, specially the sports programmes.、I have been playing my new game.、Last week I went out with my cousin Jim and his wife; he told me he had joined a sport club and he has been going there for two weeks;
keywords: 现在完成进行时,重复活动,持续性,动词-ing,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 现在完成进行时肯定形式：have/has been doing
examples: I have been thinking about your letter.、We've been studying together since grade one.、The letter was from my brother, who has been living in New York since he graduated from university.
keywords: 现在完成进行时,肯定形式,have been doing,持续性动作,for/since

content: Guideword: USE: SINGLE CONTINUING EVENT. CanDo: Can use the present perfect continuous to talk about a single activity or state that began in the past and is still continuing, often with 'for' or 'since'.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 现在完成进行时：描述从过去持续到现在的单一活动
examples: I've been studying International business there for four years.、I've been living here since last April and it seemed no problem during spring and summer.、Susan has been working in our company for 6 years as a Sales Representative.
keywords: 现在完成进行时,持续活动,for,since,动词-ing

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'ALREADY'. CanDo: Can use the present perfect simple with 'already' to emphasise that something is done, often before the expected time.  ► adverbs
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时与already连用：强调已完成动作
examples: I've already planned the party, bought his present, and most important of all, I 've already told everyone.、I have already bought a new arm-chair, yellow and comfortable.、In Spain lots of universities have already accepted this plan..、So we decided to go to Farhang cinema tonight and we have already bought the tickets.、She has already won three gold medals at international tournaments.
keywords: 现在完成时,already,过去分词,强调已完成,副词位置

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative forms with a range of pronouns and nouns and an increasing range of verbs.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时肯定式：基本结构与用法
examples: I've left some clothes at the dry cleaner's 100 yards from my home, in Park Street.、It's been an amazing week for me.、She is from California, but she has just moved to Italy.、Our company has signed deals with a few German companies.
keywords: 现在完成时,肯定式,过去分词,have/has,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative forms with a range of pronouns and an increasing range of verbs.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时否定形式：hasn't/haven't + 过去分词
examples: He hasn't spoken to anyone from that time till now.、She is a quiet person so she has not made a lot of friends.、We haven't decided where to go yet, but probably it will be to somewhere like Australia or New Zealand.
keywords: 现在完成时,否定形式,hasn't,haven't,过去分词,未完成动作,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: DURATION WITH 'SINCE'. CanDo: Can use the present perfect simple with 'since' to talk about duration.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时与'since'连用：表示持续时间的用法
examples: I have been here since August 2006.、It's been a long time since we went out together so I think we will have a great time at the park playing sports and chatting!、Many things have changed since your last visit.、Such a long time has passed since the last time we met.
keywords: 现在完成时,since,持续时间,过去分词,时间点

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the negative question form.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时否定疑问句：Haven't you...? 结构
examples: Haven't you seen it yet?、Haven't your parents given you their advice?
keywords: 现在完成时,否定疑问句,Haven't you,过去分词,yet

content: Guideword: USE: RECENT PAST. CanDo: Can use the present perfect simple to refer to a finished event or state in the recent past, that has a present relevance, often with 'just'.  ► adverbs
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时：表示最近发生的、与现在相关的事件
examples: My mother has broken her right leg.、I've just received your mail.、I've found a job for you.
keywords: 现在完成时,最近过去,just,过去分词,现在相关性

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use the present perfect simple with an increasing range of adverbs in the normal mid position.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时与副词搭配：中位副词的正确使用
examples: This is a famous seafood restaurant, you know, I've always loved seafood.、Have you ever been to Gorgeousbi?
keywords: 现在完成时,副词,中位位置,频率副词,时间副词

content: Guideword: USE: UNFINISHED. CanDo: Can use the present perfect simple to refer to a state or period of time which is unlimited or indefinite.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时：表示未完成或无限期的状态或时间段
examples: In spite of bad weather forecasts on TV, it has been a sunny, warm weekend.、I've had a really nice week.、It is a great movie. It has won a lot of prizes so I think it will be good to see it at the cinema.
keywords: 现在完成时,未完成时间段,持续状态,时间状语,过去分词

content: Guideword: USE: WITH SUPERLATIVE. CanDo: Can use the present perfect simple with a superlative adjective to talk about a unique experience.  ► adjectives: superlatives
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时与最高级形容词搭配：描述独特经历
examples: This restaurant has the most delicious shrimps I have ever tasted.、That is the best game I've ever played.、I've never been there before but my friend Pepo said that it is the biggest park she has ever seen.、At the top of that, you will see the most amazing view you have ever seen.
trigger_lemmas: the most、the best、i have ever、i've ever
keywords: 现在完成时,最高级形容词,独特经历,ever,the most

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'BY' IN A RELATIVE CLAUSE|. CanDo: Can use the passive with 'by' in a relative clause, often to add more information.
chinese_human_name: 被动语态在定语从句中的使用：带'by'的被动结构
examples: I also like wearing clothes which are manufactured by famous brands.、It's the highest mountain in U.A.E. Special roads were built for people to reach the top of the mountain, which was surrounded by houses.
keywords: 被动语态,定语从句,by短语,关系代词,过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM: PRESENT SIMPLE, AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the present simple passive affirmative with a range of pronoun and noun subjects.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时被动语态：肯定句形式
examples: Our office is situated near the airport.、The walls are painted in a dark blue, and the floor is wood.
keywords: 被动语态,一般现在时,肯定句,be动词,过去分词,执行者

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST SIMPLE, AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the past simple passive affirmative with a range of pronoun and noun subjects both singular and plural.
chinese_human_name: 过去时被动语态：肯定句形式
examples: It was written in a strange language that I tried to translate.、Next day, I heard that my neighbour's car was stolen.、They filmed the flowers and trees, and some pupils were interviewed about their work in the garden, too.
keywords: 被动语态,过去时,肯定句,was/were,过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM: PRESENT CONTINUOUS, AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the present continuous passive affirmative with a limited range of verbs.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时被动语态肯定式：is/are being + 过去分词
examples: Did you know that the next Harry Potter movie is being filmed in my school?、Why don't we stay at my house and visit Tokyo, where an interesting Japanese history exhibition is being held.、As a result of that, Russia's economy is being followed by many experts.、They filmed a class where the clothes are being tested at the moment and they interviewed some people.
trigger_lemmas: is being、are being、being filmed、being held、being tested
keywords: 被动语态,现在进行时,being,过去分词,正在进行

content: Guideword: FORM: INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use the passive infinitive after a limited number of forms including 'going to', 'have to', 'need to', 'want to'.
chinese_human_name: 被动不定式：与going to、have to、need to、want to等搭配使用
examples: It is going to be shown this Friday.、After that, they printed an authorisation, form which had to be signed by my parents because I'm not over eighteen.、He wants to be informed about sales development by the end of November 2001.
keywords: 被动不定式,going to,have to,need to,want to,过去分词,被动语态

content: Guideword: USE: PRESENT CONTINUOUS, FUTURE REFERENCE. CanDo: Can use the present continuous passive to refer to the future.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时被动语态表示将来：is being held, are being visited
examples: The seminar is being held at Chennai in the next week.、We are being visited by our Sales Director on Thursday morning.
trigger_lemmas: is being held、are being visited、is being launched、are being completed
keywords: 现在进行时被动语态,将来时间状语,已安排事件,被动语态形式,正式语境

content: Guideword: USE: GIVING FOCUS WITH 'BY'. CanDo: Can use the passive with 'by' to give focus.
chinese_human_name: 被动语态：用by强调动作执行者
examples: My school was chosen by the TV company because it is one of the newest in town.
keywords: 被动语态,by短语,动作执行者,过去分词,强调焦点

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH VERBS TAKING TWO OBJECTS.. CanDo: Can use the past simple passive with a limited range of verbs needing two objects, putting the indirect object in subject position.
chinese_human_name: 被动语态：双宾语动词的过去简单被动式（间接宾语作主语）
examples: So I was given a ticket for a train, running from Berlin to Munich.、We were lucky, because we were given another chance.
keywords: 被动语态,双宾语动词,间接宾语,过去简单式,主语位置

content: Guideword: FORM: PRESENT SIMPLE, NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the present simple passive negative with a range of pronoun and noun subjects.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时被动语态否定式：is/are not + 过去分词
examples: The story is about a girl, who is not accepted in her class.、I think we should replace the printer, because it prints very slowly and the sheets aren't printed properly.
trigger_lemmas: is not accepted、are not printed、is not followed
keywords: 被动语态,一般现在时,否定式,过去分词,be动词

content: Guideword: FORM: 'GET' + '-ED'. CanDo: Can form the 'get'-passive with a range of forms of 'get' + past participles.
category: SuperCategory: PASSIVES. SubCategory: get and have
chinese_human_name: 被动语态：'get' + 过去分词结构
examples: [talking about a mirror] I bought it because mine got broken, so I need it to see myself in it.、You should be careful while you are crossing or you will get hurt.、Last week my husband's car got stolen from our garage.、As we have newly recruited staff, we want our staff to get trained effectively so that they can give their best to the Company.、We got paid well and I managed to save the most money for my studies.
trigger_lemmas: get broken、get hurt、get stolen、get trained、get paid
keywords: 被动语态,get被动,过去分词,口语表达,动作结果

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPLEX NOUN PHRASES WITH ADVERBS + ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can form complex noun phrases with adverb + adjective + noun.
chinese_human_name: 复杂名词短语：副词+形容词+名词结构
examples: It took us a very long time but it was a great fun!、They made really good friends.
trigger_lemmas: very long time、really good friends、quite interesting story、extremely hot weather
keywords: 复杂名词短语,副词修饰形容词,程度副词,词序,描述性短语

content: Guideword: FORM: NOUN + PREPOSITIONAL PHRASES. CanDo: Can form complex noun phrases by using a prepositional phrase after the main noun in a noun phrase.
chinese_human_name: 名词短语扩展：名词+介词短语
examples: It was a beautiful red dress with blue flowers on the back.、Yesterday a TV company came to our school to make a film about Bavarian pupils.、I don't spend too much time in front of the television, I just watch it twice a week and on Sundays morning.、I received your letter and you asked me about the future of my town.、I have to travel to Montevideo to see my doctor because I'm having some problems with my health.
keywords: 名词短语,介词短语,with,about,in front of

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPLEX NOUN PHRASES WITH ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can form an increasing range of complex noun phrases with more than one adjective.
chinese_human_name: 复杂名词短语：多个形容词修饰名词
examples: The Northeast is so beautiful and it's famous because of its white sandy beaches and the coconut trees.、Last weekend I went to São Paulo to buy some winter clothes. I bought a white hooded jacket, a blue jumper, black gloves and a beautiful blue scarf.、Inside there were three samples of a nasty purple liquid.、I know your company are offering an exciting new service in our area.、He had beautiful green eyes, short, curly, red hair and he was wearing an elegant black suit with a red tie.、You can walk along the streets and eat typical Spanish food in good restaurants.
trigger_lemmas: white sandy beaches、blue jumper、elegant black suit、exciting new service
keywords: 形容词顺序,名词短语,修饰语,词序规则,复杂描述

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'SUCH (A)' + ADJECTIVE + NOUN. CanDo: Can form noun phrases with 'such a' + adjective + singular noun and 'such' + adjective + plural noun, to give emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 强调性名词短语：such (a) + 形容词 + 名词
examples: It was so terrible because I've never been in such a terrible situation.、So it was really funny to hear from her after such a long time.、Thank you for giving me such a fantastic birthday present.、Also, we both liked to read and that was why we were such good friends.、I had never worn such high heels before.
keywords: such,such a,形容词,名词短语,强调

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NOUN PHRASES WITH SUPERLATIVES. CanDo: Can use a clause with a present perfect or past perfect as a superlative noun phrase complement, to talk about uniqueness.
chinese_human_name: 最高级名词短语：用现在完成时或过去完成时从句补充说明独特性
examples: It has the best promenade I have seen.、The best book I've read is "The Da Vinci code".、It was the best decision you had ever made.、We enjoy going shopping, walking and talking hour after hour - She's the funniest person I've ever known!
trigger_lemmas: the best、the most、i have ever、you had ever
keywords: 最高级形容词,名词短语,现在完成时,过去完成时,独特性

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: POSSESSIVE '‘S' WITHOUT NOUN. CanDo: Can omit the noun after possessive '’s' to talk about a place which is familiar to the speaker and listener.
chinese_human_name: 所有格's省略名词：谈论熟悉的地点
examples: Last week I left my clothes at the dry cleaner's and I can't collect them.、I have to go to the dentist’s.、I'll be picking you up at eight o'clock near the McDonald's, OK?、I'm going to be absent from the English class next week, because I am going to the doctor's.、It's next to your grandma's.
trigger_lemmas: at the、go to the、near the、to the
keywords: 所有格's,省略名词,熟悉地点,地点省略,简洁表达

content: Guideword: FORM: NOUN PHRASE, NOUN PHRASE. CanDo: Can put two noun phrases together (in apposition) to refer to the same person or thing, usually separated by commas.
chinese_human_name: 名词短语同位语：用逗号连接两个指代同一事物的名词短语
examples: Mr Miller, the Sales Director, will visit us next Thursday.、Yesterday my boyfriend and I decided to go on a cycling holiday to visit some places in the country near Eboli, the town where we live.、She has come with me and two more friends, Peter and Gorha.、I spoke with her and she looks really happy, although a little sad because her best friend, Alison, did not pass the exam.、A new employee, Mary Watts, has just joined our company.
keywords: 名词短语,同位语,逗号分隔,补充信息,指代同一事物

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THE THING …'. CanDo: Can use the noun phrase 'The thing' in front position, with a clause complement, to give focus to something.
chinese_human_name: 名词短语'The thing'前置强调结构
examples: The thing I enjoyed most about it was a new computer game. (Georgia (Republic of); B1 THRESHOLD; 2007; Georgian; Pass)、The thing I prefer there is the swimming-pool, because I have met someone there.
keywords: 名词短语,前置强调,关系从句,焦点结构,个人偏好表达

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPLEX NOUN PHRASE WITH POSSESSIVE '‘S' + NOUN. CanDo: Can form complex noun phrases with noun phrase + 'of' + noun phrase + possessive determiner ''s' + noun phrase.
chinese_human_name: 复杂名词短语：名词短语 + 'of' + 所有格's + 名词短语
examples: I ran to the street and I saw the window of my neighbour's car was broken.、The subject of my boss's talk will be IT skills.、My friend Ronald had been chosen to play the role of James Bond's son!、My best friend is called Sindi and we met at my brother's birthday. She is the sister of my brother's girlfriend so he invited her as well.、The delivery date should be the day of my friend's birthday.
trigger_lemmas: the window of、the subject of、the role of、the day of
keywords: 复杂名词短语,所有格's,of连接,所属关系,名词短语结构

content: Guideword: FORM: INDEFINITE PRONOUNS. CanDo: Can form noun phrases with an indefinite pronoun + adjective or clause.
chinese_human_name: 不定代词短语：不定代词+形容词/从句
examples: We see each other every day and do something different every day.、You could bring something to drink.、But then there is nothing special to eat.
trigger_lemmas: something different、nothing special、anything to eat、everything possible
keywords: 不定代词,形容词后置,不定式从句,something,nothing,anything

content: Guideword: FORM: FRIEND + 'OF' + POSSESSIVE DETERMINER + NOUN. CanDo: Can form noun phrases with 'a friend of' or 'friends of' + possessive determiner + noun.
chinese_human_name: 名词短语：'a friend of'/'friends of' + 物主限定词 + 名词
examples: He is a friend of my husband.、I just thought they were friends of my neighbour who were going to visit him.
keywords: 名词短语,物主限定词,a friend of,friends of,所属关系

content: Guideword: FORM: NOUN + 'OF' + POSSESSIVE PRONOUN. CanDo: Can form noun phrases with noun + 'of' + possessive pronouns.
chinese_human_name: 名词短语：名词 + 'of' + 物主代词
examples: … we always did everything together and couldn't stop laughing as she told me many funny stories and I told her lots of silly mistakes of mine.、A colleague of mine has told me about a Swiss hotel in London.、I was looking for something special to do for my last week off and some schoolmates of mine invited me to join the cycling holiday.、I'm a fan of his, he is my favorite singer.、I want this dream of mine to come true.
keywords: 名词短语,物主代词,of,所属关系,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: COMMON NOUNS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of common nouns.
chinese_human_name: 普通名词的扩展使用：掌握常见名词的灵活运用
examples: When you're swimming you exercise all of your body.、You just have to send me your design and I'll do the rest.、My heart was hurt and nobody will repair the damage.
keywords: 普通名词,可数名词,不可数名词,复数形式,冠词使用

content: Guideword: FORM: COLLECTIVE NOUNS. CanDo: Can use collective nouns, usually with a singular verb, but also with a plural verb depending on whether the noun is perceived as a single group or collection of individuals.
chinese_human_name: 集体名词的单复数动词搭配：根据语境选择is/are
examples: The staff is friendly and polite with guests and there are many sports activities.、After the spring break the whole staff have to start work at 7.15 am.、A TV company has decided to make a film in my high school because it's a normal secondary school.、The crew were very interested in what the new school looked like and they were amazed at the colours we used to paint it.、Our company is interested in your company's services.
keywords: 集体名词,单数动词,复数动词,整体与个体,主谓一致

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH DETERMINERS, QUANTITY. CanDo: Can use uncountable nouns with an increasing range of quantity words and phrases including 'much', 'a bit of', 'a little bit of', 'enough', 'further', 'plenty of', 'loads of'.  ►  Determiners: quantity
chinese_human_name: 不可数名词与数量限定词搭配：much, a bit of, enough, plenty of等
examples: I'm sure that your parents are looking forward to going with you to the beach, because they work a lot of hours during the year so they can't spend much time with you.、I know you have sent me somebody to fix it but every time that it rains, at least a bit of water comes inside the house.、I hope this little bit of advice can help you!、I prefer to buy only what I need because I don't have enough money.、So I would like you to attend a meeting next week for further information.、My Finance department is very busy, I have loads of work to finish.
keywords: 不可数名词,数量限定词,much,a bit of,enough,plenty of,further

content: Guideword: FORM: UNCOUNTABLE NOUNS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of uncountable nouns.
chinese_human_name: 不可数名词的扩展使用：掌握常见抽象与物质名词
examples: I think the countryside is better than the town centre, people get on more easily with each other.、Well, I love shopping for clothes because I love fashion.、I hope you can help me to find new accommodation as soon as is possible.、Firstly, you can admire lovely architecture and visit a museum about our history.
keywords: 不可数名词,抽象名词,物质名词,量词搭配,谓语动词单数

content: Guideword: FORM: AUXILIARY VERBS 'BE', 'HAVE', PAST. CanDo: Can form negative statements of main verbs in the past continuous and past perfect with auxiliary verbs 'be' and 'have' + 'not/n't'. ► past continuous ► past perfect
chinese_human_name: 过去进行时与过去完成时的否定形式：be/have + not/n't
examples: It was raining for seventy two hours and it wasn't going to stop.、I hadn't expected to receive a letter from her.
keywords: 过去进行时,过去完成时,否定形式,助动词,was/were,had,not/n't

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use negative question forms in main clauses and question tags. ► questions
chinese_human_name: 否定疑问句与反意疑问句：Can't you...? 和 ..., aren't you?
examples: Can't you go with your parents some time and with your friends later?、Don't you think it's fun?、Aren't you excited about it?、You're free on Saturday , aren't you?、I think it would be fantastic, wouldn't it?
keywords: 否定疑问句,反意疑问句,助动词,疑问标签,语气表达

content: Guideword: FORM: MENTAL PROCESS VERBS + CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use the negative forms of mental process verbs ('I don’t think', 'I don’t believe') followed by a complement clause, where the negative form is in the mental process verb rather than the complement clause.
chinese_human_name: 心理过程动词否定式+从句：I don't think/believe + 从句
examples: But I don't think it'll help you.、I don't think I'll live here forever because I intend to move to Curitiba, a southern city of my country.、I don't believe that the suitcase will be returned to me.
trigger_lemmas: i don't think、i don't believe、i don't suppose
keywords: 心理过程动词,否定转移,补语从句,I don't think,委婉表达

content: Guideword: FORM: 'NOT', NON FINITE AND ELLIPTED CLAUSES. CanDo: Can use 'not' before a non-finite or ellipted clause.
chinese_human_name: 否定词 'not' 在非限定性从句和省略从句中的用法
examples: But every time a small envelope arrived, I ripped it open as fast as I could. Not this time.、I would like to apologise for not being able to attend on Friday 13th June for my visit.、The picnic will be held in the park three kilometres away from the city center so it will be quiet and not crowded.、Well, I think it will be better for you to go to a large school in the centre of the town and not to the small school.
keywords: 否定词 not,非限定性从句,省略从句,不定式,动名词

content: Guideword: USE: SEEKING AGREEMENT. CanDo: Can use negative questions and question tags to involve the listener/reader by seeking agreement or checking something.
chinese_human_name: 否定疑问句与附加疑问句：寻求同意或确认
examples: Isn't it marvellous?、Don't you think it's fantastic?、You love books, don't you?
keywords: 否定疑问句,附加疑问句,寻求同意,确认信息,语调

content: Guideword: FORM: PRONOUNS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of indefinite pronouns in negative contexts.
chinese_human_name: 否定语境中的不定代词：nothing、anything、anyone等
examples: I said I had nothing, but he didn't believe me.、I haven't seen anything yet. (Georgia (Republic of); B1 THRESHOLD; 2007; Georgian; Pass)、I didn't tell anyone about this story at first.
trigger_lemmas: have nothing、don't have anything、didn't see anyone
keywords: 不定代词,否定句,nothing,anything,anyone

content: Guideword: FORM: ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use adverbs 'ever', 'never', 'yet', 'still' in negative contexts.
chinese_human_name: 否定语境中的副词：ever, never, yet, still
examples: Nobody will ever know who that man was.、I stayed there for two weeks and it never rained.、I haven't decided yet.、But I still don't believe her.
keywords: ever,never,yet,still,否定语境,副词,现在完成时,频率副词,状态副词

content: Guideword: FORM: 'IT' + 'BE' + 'IMPORTANT' + CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'it' + 'be' + 'important' + ('that') clause.
chinese_human_name: 形式主语结构：It is important that从句
examples: It's important that you take breaks and don't work all the time.、It's important that you eat healthy food.、I think it's important that you analyze each point to decide what to do.
trigger_lemmas: it is important、it was important、i think it's important
keywords: 形式主语,that从句,important,建议句型,重要性表达

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IF'-CLAUSE + 'POSSIBLE', POLITENESS. CanDo: Can use 'if-' clauses + 'possible', as a politeness strategy.
chinese_human_name: 礼貌请求句型：'if-'从句 + 'possible'
examples: If it is possible I would like to pay by credit card.、If possible, please re-deliver the same goods right now.、I'm not free at 6 so I'd change it to 9 if it's possible.、If it's possible, could you send the cards to my office in London?、I would prefer the 15th of July if it is possible.、The opening hours are quite convenient but, if possible, I would like the pool to open a bit earlier - at 8.30 am, for example.
trigger_lemmas: if it is possible、if possible、if it's possible
keywords: if从句,possible,礼貌策略,情态动词,省略形式

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IT' + 'BE' + ADJECTIVE + INFINITIVE, HEDGING, EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use 'it' + 'be' + adjective + 'to' + infinitive, to make an assertion more or less direct.
chinese_human_name: It+be+形容词+不定式结构：表达断言与委婉强调
examples: Our sales department staff are heavily involved in several international projects, so it is necessary to improve their foreign language skills.、But sometimes it's essential to do what your parents want you to do. (Georgia (Republic of); B1 THRESHOLD; 2008; Georgian; Pass)、In the centre of town it is possible to do more activities after school.、[talking about a computer problem] It was impossible to install the system.
trigger_lemmas: it is necessary to、it is essential to、it is possible to、it is impossible to
keywords: 形式主语,不定式,形容词,断言,委婉强调

content: Guideword: FORM: 'IT' + 'BE' + ADJECTIVE + 'FOR' + OBJECT + INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use 'it' + 'be' + adjective + 'for' + object + 'to' + infinitive.
chinese_human_name: 形式主语结构：It + be + 形容词 + for + 宾语 + 不定式
examples: If you have to choose between two schools, I think it's important for you to know what they’re like.、It's impossible for me to meet with you at six o'clock.、It is important for everyone to attend this meeting.、[talking about not missing class] It's essential for me to go because I think I can't study physics by myself.
keywords: 形式主语,形容词,不定式,for + 宾语,句型结构

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the negative question forms in main clauses and question tags.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can的否定疑问句：主句否定疑问与附加疑问
examples: Can't you go with your parents some time and with your friends later?、Why can't she visit them alone and I can relax at the beach?、You can ask your parents what they think you should do, can't you?
keywords: 情态动词,否定疑问句,附加疑问,can't,句型结构

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use 'can' with a limited range of adverbs (including 'also', 'always', 'even', 'just', 'only', 'really', 'still') in the normal mid position after the modal verb.   ► adverbs
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can与副词搭配：中位副词用法
examples: You can also write postcards and letters to your friends.、I can only tell you what I think about it, because you have to decide.、I can't even remember the girl's face.、The trouble is that I can't really afford it.
keywords: 情态动词,副词,词序,中位副词,can搭配

content: Guideword: USE: GENERAL TRUTHS AND TENDENCIES. CanDo: Can use 'can be' to talk about general truths and tendencies.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can：表达普遍真理和倾向性
examples: … spending an entire summer without your friends can be very boring.、Sitting all day long in front of a computer can be very stressful.、The centre of town can be more dangerous and noisy.
keywords: 情态动词,普遍真理,倾向性,可能性表达,can be结构

content: Guideword: USE: SURPRISE. CanDo: Can use 'can you believe' to express surprise.
chinese_human_name: 表达惊讶的固定短语：can you believe
