examples: They invented a robot which plays football, can you believe this?、It cost me £50! Can you believe that! It was expensive but worth it!
keywords: can you believe,表达惊讶,固定短语,难以置信,非正式用语

content: Guideword: FORM: MODAL WITH 'BE ABLE TO'. CanDo: Can use a range of modal verbs + 'be able to' + infinitive.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 情态动词+be able to结构：表达可能性与能力
examples: After finishing school, you might be able to hang out with your friends.、If we could meet in Switzerland, we should be able to finish the project on the 20th June.、I'd be able to take walks without even worrying about inhaling polluted air.
trigger_lemmas: might be able to、could be able to、should be able to、would be able to
keywords: 情态动词,be able to,可能性表达,条件能力,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE ALLOWED TO', PERMISSION. CanDo: Can use 'be allowed to' to talk about permission.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 情态表达：be allowed to 表示许可
examples: My mother went with me on this trip because I wasn't allowed to go by myself.、You won't be allowed to do what you want and you won't enjoy yourself.
trigger_lemmas: be allowed to、not allowed to、allowed to
keywords: be allowed to,许可,情态表达,外部规则,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: 'BE' EXPRESSIONS. CanDo: Can use a limited range of expressions with 'be' + infinitive ('be allowed to', 'be supposed to', 'be able to') with present and past forms of 'be' and with modal 'will'.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: BE动词短语：be allowed to, be supposed to, be able to
examples: First of all, if you are allowed to go out of the building in your break, you should do it.、Perhaps you will be allowed to go on holiday with your friends next year.、The film is supposed to start at 7.00 pm so we'd better meet at 6.30 pm. See you there!、I was supposed to be meeting my friend Laura but she didn't come.、I am sorry but I  am not able to meet you next Tuesday.、We were able to choose the songs ourselves and so I liked them very much.
trigger_lemmas: be allowed to、be supposed to、be able to
keywords: be allowed to,be supposed to,be able to,不定式,情态动词

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE SUPPOSED TO', PAST EXPECTATION. CanDo: Can use 'was supposed to', 'were supposed to' to refer to past or future arrangements which may not have happened or may change.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 表达过去预期的短语：be supposed to的过去式用法
examples: I am really sorry, but I will have to make some changes to my trip. I was supposed to arrive on 11th June 2003, but I will arrive the next month.、It was supposed to be on Tuesday at 1.00pm.、We were supposed to meet at noon with some friends, but they called her to ask if we could meet at the restaurant.
trigger_lemmas: was supposed to、were supposed to、supposed to
keywords: be supposed to,过去预期,计划变更,未实现安排,was/were supposed to

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE ABLE TO', PAST. CanDo: Can use 'was able to', 'were able to' to talk about facts in the past.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 过去时态表达：was/were able to
examples: [about a bus journey] She was able to get a good seat and she unexpectedly got to school early.、… sales had increased recently because of the good performance of our staff so we were able to improve the quality of our products ...
trigger_lemmas: was able to、were able to、able to
keywords: was able to,were able to,过去能力,事实描述,成功完成

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'I HAVE TO ADMIT'. CanDo: Can use the fixed expression 'I have to admit' for emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 强调性固定表达：I have to admit
examples: I have to admit that I watch a lot of TV, specially movies and soap operas, I love them.、I have to admit that it is a very difficult choice.
trigger_lemmas: i have to admit、have to admit、admit
keywords: 固定表达,强调,承认,have to admit,情感色彩

content: Guideword: FORM: INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use 'have to' as an infinitive form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词短语：have to 的不定式用法
examples: I am going to have to buy new curtains.、I'm sorry to have to change the time of our meeting next Tuesday.、I'd hate to have to choose between family and friends.
trigger_lemmas: be going to have to、sorry to have to、hate to have to
keywords: have to,不定式,情态动词,必要性,未来计划

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use 'may' with a limited range of adverbs (most commonly 'also') in the normal mid-position after the modal verb. ► adverbs
chinese_human_name: 情态动词may与副词搭配：may also的用法
examples: I may also ask you for another favour....、Why don't you try going to the gym before work? It may also help you release stress?
trigger_lemmas: may also、may also ask、may also help、may also need
keywords: 情态动词,副词位置,may also,可能性表达,补充说明

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词may的否定形式：may not
examples: I knew I may not meet him again.、I realise that may not be the best way of resolving your problem.、They may not even have internet in the countryside!
trigger_lemmas: may not be、may not have、may not even
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,may not,可能性,禁止

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form with 'I'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词may的疑问句形式：May I...? 用于礼貌请求
examples: May I give you a short presentation on 17th December?、May I ask you about my accommodation?、May I ask you if our company will receive the usual 10% discount?
trigger_lemmas: may i ask、may i have、may i know、may i suggest、may i use
keywords: 情态动词,疑问句,礼貌请求,正式场合,征求许可

content: Guideword: USE: PERMISSION. CanDo: Can use 'may I' to ask for permission.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词may：请求许可的用法
examples: May I be your guide while you stay here?、May I borrow your bike?
trigger_lemmas: may i、ask for permission、formal request、polite question
keywords: 情态动词,请求许可,正式用语,礼貌表达,疑问句型

content: Guideword: USE: SUGGESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'might' to make polite suggestions and give advice.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词might：礼貌建议与劝告
examples: The park is a great place for picnic. It has lots of trees, a beautiful view and fresh air. You might need to bring some food and drink.、I really don't know what you should do, but I think that you might talk with your parents.
trigger_lemmas: might want to、might consider、might try、might need to
keywords: 情态动词,礼貌建议,委婉语气,动词原形,might not

content: Guideword: USE: POSSIBILITY IN THE PAST. CanDo: Can use 'might have' + '-ed' to talk about possibility with a past reference.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词might的过去可能性表达：might have + 过去分词
examples: Many things might have led to these changes.、I thought that a burglar might have broken into our house.
trigger_lemmas: might have been、might have done、might have gone、might have seen
keywords: 情态动词,过去可能性,might have,过去分词,推测语气

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'might have' + '-ed'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词might的过去肯定式：might have + 过去分词
examples: [talking about an unusual sound] It might have been our neighbours' cat.、They might have been right, but I don't agree with them.、He might have seen us.、In years past, you might have gone straight from school to your family's farm or joined your parents in the factory they worked in.
trigger_lemmas: might have been、might have seen、might have gone、might have done
keywords: 情态动词,过去推测,可能性,might have,过去分词

content: Guideword: USE: REPORTED SPEECH. CanDo: Can use 'might' as the past form of 'may' in indirect reports.
chinese_human_name: 间接引语中的情态动词：might作为may的过去式
examples: … my parents said it might be the last holiday where we are all together.、[talking about a lottery ticket] Lisa thought it might be a lucky one so she showed it to her Dad.
trigger_lemmas: said that、thought that、believed that、told someone that
keywords: 间接引语,转述语,might,may,时态一致

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词might的否定形式：might not和mightn't
examples: I like to wear a shirt and pants. It might not be very fashionable, it might look simple, but that's the way I like it.、I think that people watch too much TV these days and in a way this mightn't be such a good thing.
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,可能性,不确定语气,委婉表达

content: Guideword: USE: FOCUS. CanDo: Can use 'might' in phrases, such as 'as you might know', 'have already heard', to focus the reader on shared knowledge.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词might在引导共享知识短语中的用法：如as you might know
examples: As you might know, nobody came here until Wednesday afternoon.、As you might know, I've been very busy recently taking my exams.、As you might have noticed, I broke your beautiful vase which was in the hall.、As you might have already heard, there is a delay with the setting of the new computer system.
trigger_lemmas: as you might know、as you might have noticed、as you might have heard
keywords: 情态动词,might,共享知识,短语引导,委婉语气

content: Guideword: USE: INVITATIONS. CanDo: Can use 'must' to make invitations.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must的邀请用法
examples: You must come and stay in our house too.、You must come and see this restaurant!
keywords: 情态动词,邀请表达,非正式语气,must用法,友好邀请

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use 'must' with a limited range of adverbs (most commonly 'also') in the normal mid position after the modal verb. ► adverbs
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must与副词搭配：must also/always等用法
examples: I must also do the FCE practice test because I will have the FCE test soon.、… first you must always watch what you eat …
keywords: 情态动词must,副词also,中间位置,必要性表达,词序规则

content: Guideword: FORM: ELLIPSIS. CanDo: Can use ellipted 'must' without a subject. ► ellipsis
chinese_human_name: 省略主语的must用法：口语和书信中的简洁表达
examples: [at the end of a letter] Must go now.、Must be really difficult for you.
keywords: 省略主语,非正式表达,must省略,书信用语,口语推测

content: Guideword: FORM: ELLIPSIS. CanDo: Can use 'must' with the following verb ellipted where the previous main verb is understood.    ► ellipsis
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must的省略用法：省略后续动词
examples: You must! It's amazing!、To sum it up, right now, I take care of her because I must!
keywords: 情态动词,省略,语境依赖,must,动词省略

content: Guideword: USE: DEDUCTIONS AND CONCLUSIONS. CanDo: Can use 'must' to guess and deduce, most commonly with 'it must be', or 'you must be'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must：表示推测与结论的用法
examples: Second, it must be boring for you to sit at a computer all day.、[talking about moving to another town] You must be so nervous.
trigger_lemmas: it must be、you must be、there must be、must have
keywords: 情态动词,推测用法,逻辑结论,must be,合理猜测

content: Guideword: USE: OBLIGATION AND NECESSITY. CanDo: Can use 'must' (with a wide range of pronouns and nouns) to talk about obligation and necessity.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must：表示义务与必要性
examples: [talking about something the speaker has found] She took it and said we must go and find him.、Your parents must learn to let you live your own life …
keywords: 情态动词,义务,必要性,must not,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: SUGGESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'must' to make strong, encouraging suggestions.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must：表达强烈建议的用法
examples: This club has been opened for just two weeks. I mean we must see it.、[talking about a day out] We must do that again, don't you think?!、Rome is really fantastic and you must go there!
keywords: 情态动词,强烈建议,非正式语气,热情推荐,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词ought的肯定形式：ought to
examples: I think you ought to go on holiday with both of them.、Oh, I'm sorry, my mum's calling and I ought to go.
trigger_lemmas: ought to、think ought to、believe ought to
keywords: 情态动词,ought to,肯定形式,应该,义务

content: Guideword: USE: ADVICE. CanDo: Can use 'ought to' with 'you' to give advice.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词ought to：用'you ought to'给出建议
examples: Then, if you'd rather go with your friend, you ought to talk to your parents first, and tell them what you think about it.、I think that you ought to play tennis or football at the weekend.
trigger_lemmas: ought to、you ought to、ought not to
keywords: 情态动词,ought to,建议表达,动词原形,正式语气

content: Guideword: USE: PLANS AND INTENTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'shall' to talk about plans and intentions, particularly in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词shall：表达计划与意图的正式用法
examples: I promise that I shall cover all the work and give it to you tomorrow.、Remember that we shall meet inside the bar.、I apologise for having to miss tomorrow's English class as my cousin's wedding will be taking place ... I shall be attending class the day after tomorrow.
keywords: 情态动词,正式语境,计划与意图,承诺,shall结构

content: Guideword: USE: SEEKING ADVICE. CanDo: Can use 'shall' to seek advice.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词shall：用于寻求建议
examples: What shall I buy for her wedding?、[a student writing to a teacher] I am really sorry but I have to travel to Argentina for health reasons. What shall I do with next week's work?
keywords: 情态动词,shall,寻求建议,疑问句,第一人称

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'should have' + '-ed'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should的过去否定式：shouldn't have + 过去分词
examples: I have an appointment. I know I shouldn't have taken it during school time but I had no other choice.
keywords: 情态动词,过去否定式,shouldn't have,过去分词,后悔表达

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'should' have + '-ed'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should的过去肯定式：should have + 过去分词
examples: You should have been with us.、I knew I should have written before.
trigger_lemmas: should have、shouldn't have、should have been、should have done
keywords: 情态动词,过去肯定式,should have,过去分词,遗憾表达

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: QUESTION TAGS. CanDo: Can use the question tag form 'shouldn't' + pronoun to make suggestions and ask for opinions.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should的反意疑问句：用于提出建议和征求意见
examples: When you come back, we should rent some movies, shouldn't we?、I think I should write about the history of our company, shouldn't I?
keywords: 情态动词,反意疑问句,shouldn't,提出建议,征求意见

content: Guideword: USE: LIKELIHOOD. CanDo: Can use 'should' to talk about what is likely to happen.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should：表示可能性推测
examples: [talking about an event] It should be a good day!、…the weather is still warm, so we should be able to visit the beaches and go sightseeing in the evenings.
trigger_lemmas: should be、should have、should be able to、shouldn't
keywords: 情态动词,可能性推测,should be able to,逻辑推断,委婉语气

content: Guideword: USE: IDEAL OR DESIRED SITUATIONS. CanDo: Can use 'should' to talk about ideal or desired situations.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should：表达理想或期望的情况
examples: British people should eat more vegetables and fruit and avoid fast food!、I think everyone should learn to cook, you never know when you need to cook.
trigger_lemmas: think should、probably should、really should、should be able to
keywords: 情态动词,建议语气,理想状态,主观看法,非强制性

content: Guideword: USE: THANKING. CanDo: Can use 'you shouldn’t have' (+ '-ed') in polite acceptance of a gift.
chinese_human_name: 礼貌接受礼物用语：you shouldn't have (+ -ed)
examples: Thank you for the present you sent me, you shouldn't have!、Thank you for the money, you shouldn't have sent it. (Uruguay; B1 THRESHOLD; 2003; Spanish - Latin American; Pass
keywords: 礼貌表达,接受礼物,you shouldn't have,过去分词,社交用语

content: Guideword: USE: NARRATIVE DEVICE. CanDo: Can use 'you should have' + '-ed' to emphasise points in a story.
chinese_human_name: 叙事强调结构：you should have + 过去分词
examples: You should have heard the noise.、You should have seen my face, I was so happy.
trigger_lemmas: should have heard、should have seen、should have felt
keywords: should have,过去分词,叙事强调,感官动词,情感表达

content: Guideword: USE: REGRET. CanDo: Can use 'should have' + '-ed' to talk about regrets or undesirable situations in the past.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should的过去式用法：表达遗憾与后悔
examples: You should have been there with me, I had a great time.、I opened the envelope and read the letter. He had written that he was sorry and that he should not have done it.
keywords: should have,过去分词,遗憾表达,后悔语气,过去评价

content: Guideword: USE: NO LONGER TRUE. CanDo: Can use 'used to' to talk about repeated actions or states in the past that are no longer true.
chinese_human_name: 过去习惯表达：used to（表示过去经常做某事，现在不再如此）
examples: When I was I child, I used to go to a small school and I enjoyed it very much.、…and she used to come to my house and play computer games with me.、I didn't use to laugh much but since the day we met, I'm always happy.
trigger_lemmas: used to、use to、didn't use to、did you use to
keywords: used to,过去习惯,状态变化,否定形式,对比表达

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE|. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词：used to 的肯定形式
examples: I used to share my room with my brother.、When I was a little girl, we used to be together all the time.
trigger_lemmas: used to、used to be、used to have
keywords: used to,过去习惯,情态动词,肯定形式,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative forms 'didn't use to' and 'didn't used to'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词used to的否定形式：didn't use to和didn't used to
examples: We didn't use to talk to each other.、But this year I've met lots of new people that I didn't used to talk to, like Monica and Nina.
trigger_lemmas: didn't use to、didn't used to、used to
keywords: used to,否定形式,过去习惯,didn't use to,didn't used to

content: Guideword: USE: FIXED PLANS. CanDo: Can use 'will' to talk about fixed plans in the future, often with timetabled times or dates.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词will：表达固定未来计划
examples: Mr Miller, the Sales Director, will visit us next Thursday.、I'm sorry, but I won't be able to attend your class tomorrow ….
keywords: will,固定计划,未来时,时间状语,情态动词

content: Guideword: USE: PREDICTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'will' to make predictions.► question tags
chinese_human_name: 情态动词will：用于预测未来事件
examples: I think that in 20 years' time it will be bigger than it is, because my town is growing very fast.、All your life, you'll be able to look at your parents, but as soon as you finish your school, it'll be harder to meet your old friends.、But you're right, without much sport practice you'll soon put on weight, won't you?
keywords: 情态动词,未来预测,will,反意疑问句,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'would not have' + '-ed' or 'wouldn’t have' + '-ed'
chinese_human_name: 虚拟条件句过去否定式：would not have + 过去分词
examples: Without your help, I wouldn't have got this result.、Had it not been for that day, she would not have met George.
trigger_lemmas: would not have、wouldn't have、if it hadn't been for、without
keywords: 虚拟语气,过去完成时,条件句,would not have,wouldn't have

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'would have' + '-ed'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would的过去肯定式：would have + 过去分词
examples: I did not think my friend Janis would have done that.、That answer would have changed my life.
keywords: would have,过去分词,假设语气,未实现愿望,过去推测

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: AFTER 'IF' CLAUSES. CanDo: Can use 'would' in the main clause of a conditional sentence to talk about an imagined situation, often in the context of advice or opinion-giving.
chinese_human_name: 条件句中的would：在if从句后表达想象情境与建议
examples: It's your decision but if I had the chance, I would go with my friends.、If you decided to go to the country school, you'd probably have more attention as a student.、If I were you, I would not watch TV all the time.、If I were able to move, I wouldn't move because I think this street is perfect.
trigger_lemmas: if i were you、if i had、if you decided
keywords: 条件句,would,if从句,非真实条件,建议表达

content: Guideword: USE: FUTURE IN THE PAST. CanDo: Can use 'would' to talk about the future in the past.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would：过去视角中的未来表达
examples: I've just bought a new dress, and a beautiful black T-shirt. When I saw them, I thought they would be great for tonight's party.、… we thought that the film would be horrible because of the title but when the film started, the story was beautiful and Mauricio and I liked it a lot.、And she asked me if I would play the game with her against her cousin and her friend on Saturday.
keywords: would,过去将来时,间接引语,情态动词,预测表达

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use an limited range of adverbs with 'would', including 'really', 'probably', 'certainly', 'definitely'.► adverbs
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would与副词搭配：really, probably, certainly, definitely
examples: I hope you will come soon, and I think that you would really enjoy it because is something different of what you are used to.、More over in my opinion it would probably be the best idea to choose the biggest school ...、I would definitely choose to live by the sea side!
keywords: 情态动词,would,副词,really,probably,certainly,definitely,假设语气,可能性

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use question forms.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would的疑问句用法
examples: Would you let me know what you think?、Would you please do me a favour? Could you go and collect the clothes for me?、Think of the fun you will have with your friends, the whole day hanging around, playing sports, eating ice cream. Wouldn't that be wonderful?、I think it would be fantastic, wouldn't it?
trigger_lemmas: would you、wouldn't it、would you like、would you mind
keywords: would,疑问句,情态动词,礼貌请求,假设提问

content: Guideword: USE: POLITE REQUESTS. CanDo: Can use 'would' to make polite requests, often in the fixed expression 'would you mind'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would：礼貌请求的用法
examples: Would you tell me about your room in your next letter, please?、Would it be possible for you to meet me later that day, around 7?、I had forgotten I have an appointment with my dentist at that time, so, would you mind if we met at 5 o'clock instead of meeting at 4 o'clock?、We are supposed to have a barbecue for lunch, would you mind bringing a salad?
trigger_lemmas: would you mind、would it be possible、would you
keywords: would,礼貌请求,would you mind,情态动词,固定表达

content: Guideword: USE: INDIRECTNESS. CanDo: Can use 'would' with verbs such as 'advise', 'imagine', 'recommend', 'say' to be less direct.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would的间接表达用法：与advise、imagine、recommend、say等动词搭配
examples: I'd advise you to go with your friends because I bet you'll have so much fun!、If you want my opinion, I'd recommend the countryside because I think that the city in my country is very noisy.、Finally, I'd say that you should talk with your parents and your friends to decide.、If you have decided to move, I would say that it is better for you to choose the large school in the centre of the town.
keywords: 情态动词,would,间接表达,建议动词,礼貌语气

content: Guideword: USE: IMAGINED SITUATIONS IN THE PAST. CanDo: Can use 'would' to talk about imagined situations in the past. ► conditionals
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would：谈论过去想象中的情境
examples: The next week I would have flown to Miami to meet George Clooney.、If I were in your shoes I would have chosen the school which is in the centre of town…、If you hadn't helped me, I wouldn't have known how to do that homework project.、If I had gone with uncomfortable shoes, I wouldn't have danced all the time.
trigger_lemmas: if i had、would have、wouldn't have、in your shoes
keywords: would,虚拟条件句,过去完成时,假设情境,would have done

content: Guideword: USE: REPORTED SPEECH. CanDo: Can use 'would' as the past form of 'will' in reported clauses.
chinese_human_name: 间接引语中的would：作为will的过去式用法
examples: She accepted the invitation and she said that she would come on the 21st of June.、I felt better when he said that he would be in Fenerbahce.、He told me I would like it and he was right!
trigger_lemmas: said that、told me that、thought that、explained that
keywords: 间接引语,reported speech,时态一致,will的过去式,转述动词

content: Guideword: USE: WILLINGNESS IN THE PAST. CanDo: Can use the negative forms of 'would' to talk about willingness in the past.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would的否定式：表示过去的不愿意
examples: We had to leave without you because the bus driver wouldn't wait.、[talking about a guitar] It was all that I wanted in life but my parents would not allow me to buy it.
trigger_lemmas: would not wait、would not allow、would not listen、would not help
keywords: would not,wouldn't,过去不愿意,拒绝,主观意愿,情态动词否定式

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of adverbs, for emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 副词强调用法：certainly, obviously, definitely等
examples: If I were you I'd certainly choose not to go with your parents.、I will certainly ring you on Friday.、Well, with the job you’ve got, you obviously can't keep fit.、For these reasons, I definitely recommend staying in a city.
keywords: 副词强调,certainly,obviously,definitely,语气加强

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: MODAL VERB + MODAL ADVERB, HEDGING OR EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use modal verb + modal adverb to modify an assertion, either through hedging or emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词+情态副词：弱化或强调断言
examples: Next year you can surely go somewhere with your friends.、You should probably bring sun block, because it's going be hot, and some food of course.、In my opinion if you decided to go to a large school in the centre of town, you would certainly meet a lot of cool people and you'd probably find it great.
keywords: 情态动词,情态副词,弱化,强调,断言修饰

content: Guideword: FORM/USE, 'POSSIBLY', POLITENESS. CanDo: Can use 'could' + subject + 'possibly' to make requests more polite.
chinese_human_name: 礼貌请求句型：Could + 主语 + possibly + 动词原形
examples: Could I possibly see you at 3.30?、Could you possibly recommend what action should be taken?
keywords: could,possibly,礼貌请求,情态动词,副词

content: Guideword: USE: ABILITY. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form of 'could' to talk about ability.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词could：表示过去能力的肯定用法
examples: … she could hear a man talking, he was giving her orders…
keywords: 情态动词,过去能力,肯定形式,动词原形,感官动词

content: Guideword: USE: PERMISSION. CanDo: Can use 'could I' to seek permission.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词could：礼貌请求许可的用法
examples: I am in the basketball team of my school and tomorrow there is an important game. Could I take the class that I will miss on Saturday?、…my mother went to the shop and bought the game. She said: "David, I have got something for you" … I said, “Could I play with it now, please?”
trigger_lemmas: could i、could i please、could i have
keywords: 情态动词,could,请求许可,礼貌用语,疑问句

content: Guideword: USE: POSSIBILITY. CanDo: Can use 'could' to talk about possibility.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词could：表示可能性
examples: But believe me, it could be really fun to have a talkative person as your friend, he or she will give you good laugh at anytime!、Could this really happen? Could he really be there, in that dark café …?
keywords: 情态动词,可能性,推测,could be,不确定

content: Guideword: USE: SUGGESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'could' with an increasing range of verbs to make suggestions.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词could：用于提出建议
examples: …you could become a member of a gym.、We could meet in the nice cafe next to your house and have a coffee.、I'm afraid that I need to change the time of our meeting. Could it be at 5.30 pm?
keywords: 情态动词,建议,委婉语气,动词原形,礼貌表达

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form with 'will' and 'shall'.
chinese_human_name: 将来进行时肯定式：will/shall be doing
examples: However, I shall be attending class the day after tomorrow and I shall cover the work I miss by copying it from John.、We will be waiting for you at the River's Café at 6.30.
keywords: 将来进行时,肯定式,will,shall,动词-ing

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE WITH 'WILL'. CanDo: Can use the negative form with 'will' ('won’t').
chinese_human_name: 将来进行时否定形式：won't be doing
examples: I would like you to know that I won't be attending your English class next week.、I won't be coming because my family and I are going on a tour of London.
trigger_lemmas: won't be、will not be、not be attending、not be coming
keywords: 将来进行时,否定形式,won't,动词-ing,时间状语

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE GOING TO'. CanDo: Can use the simple past form of 'be' + 'going to' to talk about the future from a point in the past. ► 'be going to'
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future in the past
chinese_human_name: 过去将来时：be going to的过去形式
examples: She was going to return it but she saw something very strange, her number was on the screen.、She didn't know what was going to happen.、We were going to meet two days later in the square next to the centre.
trigger_lemmas: was going to、were going to、going to happen
keywords: 过去将来时,be going to,was/were going to,过去计划,未实现意图

content: Guideword: USE: 'WOULD'. CanDo: Can use 'would' to talk about the future from a point in the past.► 'would'
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future in the past
chinese_human_name: 过去视角谈未来：使用 'would' 表达过去对未来的预测
examples: I've just bought a new dress, and a beautiful black T-shirt. When I saw them, I thought they would be great for tonight's party.、… we thought that the film would be horrible because of the title but when the film started, the story was beautiful and Mauricio and I liked it a lot.、As I saw the advert, I knew it would be a lovely birthday present.
keywords: would,过去视角,未来预测,间接引语,时间转换

content: Guideword: USE:IMMEDIATE PLANS WITH 'SHALL'. CanDo: Can use 'shall' with 'I' and 'we' to talk about plans and intentions.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future simple (with will and shall)
chinese_human_name: 将来时简单式：用shall表达立即计划（I/we主语）
examples: I promise that I shall cover all the work and give it to you tomorrow.、After that, I shall go to the beach.、We shall have a meeting regarding this next week.
keywords: shall,将来时,立即计划,I/we主语,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: PREDICTIONS WITH 'WILL'. CanDo: Can use 'will' and '‘ll' to make predictions.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future simple (with will and shall)
chinese_human_name: 一般将来时预测用法：will和'll的预测表达
examples: It will be hotter because of global warming.、But, if you go on holiday with your parents, there are some advantages too: you will not have money problems and your parents will not worry about you too much!、I won't live here in the future, because in March I'm moving to Lima, to study at the university.
trigger_lemmas: i think、probably、in the future、it will be
keywords: will预测,'ll缩写,一般将来时,未来预测,won't否定

content: Guideword: USE: FIXED PLANS WITH 'WILL'. CanDo: Can use 'will' to talk about fixed plans, often with timetabled times and dates.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future simple (with will and shall)
chinese_human_name: 将来时简单式：用will表达固定计划
examples: The work will start at 8 a.m. and finish at 2 p.m. The new schedule starts on 1 June.、I won't be able to get there at the time we agreed.
trigger_lemmas: will start、will finish、won't be able、at the time
keywords: 将来时简单式,will,固定计划,时间状语,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future with be going to
chinese_human_name: 将来时否定形式：be going to 的否定句
examples: I am not going to go to school tomorrow.、Also you can do whatever you want because there is not going to be an adult there to stop you.
trigger_lemmas: be not going to、not going to be、going to
keywords: 否定形式,be going to,将来时,动词原形,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST. CanDo: Can use the past form of 'be' + 'going to'. ► future in the past
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future with be going to
chinese_human_name: 过去将来时：be going to的过去形式
examples: When we realized it was going to be an extremely hot day, we took water.、We were going to meet at 11.30 am but instead we will meet now at 2.30 pm at the same place.
trigger_lemmas: was going to、were going to、thought was going to、planned were going to
keywords: 过去将来时,be going to,was/were,动词原形,计划意图

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use 'be' + 'going to' with a limited range of adverbs, after the auxiliary be form, in the normal mid position.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future with be going to
chinese_human_name: 将来时be going to与副词搭配：副词在be后的位置
examples: I know that I 'm never going to forget this moment.、Although we are really happy with your new and, maybe, better job, we are really going to miss you.
trigger_lemmas: be really going to、be never going to、be probably going to
keywords: be going to,副词位置,将来时,情感强调,词序规则

content: Guideword: USE: INTENTIONS. CanDo: Can use the negative form of 'be going to' to talk about plans and intentions.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future with be going to
chinese_human_name: 将来时态：be going to的否定形式表达意图和计划
examples: I 'm not going to be able to meet you next Tuesday, because I have to go to the dentist at 5.30.、I'm sure I'm not going to live in Kutná Hora forever.
trigger_lemmas: be not going to、not going to be able to、not going to live
keywords: be going to,否定形式,意图,计划,未来时态

content: Guideword: USE: FUTURE IN THE PAST. CanDo: Can use the past form of 'be going to' to refer to the future from a point in the past. ► future in the past
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future with be going to
chinese_human_name: 过去将来时：be going to的过去形式
examples: She didn't know what was going to happen.、We were going to meet two days later in the square next to the centre.
trigger_lemmas: was going to、were going to、didn't know what was going to happen
keywords: 过去将来时,future in the past,was going to,were going to,过去计划

content: Guideword: USE: REPORTING. CanDo: Can use the past form of 'be going to' as the reported form.► reported speech
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future with be going to
chinese_human_name: 间接引语中的过去将来时：was/were going to
examples: Fortunately, he was told his boss was going to be a bit late, so he had some time to go back home.、I was very worried but at the end he called me and told me he and his family were fine and that he was going to arrive tomorrow.
trigger_lemmas: said that、told me、thought that、was going to、were going to
keywords: 间接引语,转述引语,过去将来时,was going to,were going to,时态变化,转述动词

content: Guideword: USE: PREDICTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'be going to' with an increasing range of verbs to make predictions.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future with be going to
chinese_human_name: 将来时预测表达：be going to 表示预测
examples: I think you're going to like it.、And don't you think you are going to miss your parents?、I think I am going to enjoy that class.、I think that I am not going to sleep tonight because tomorrow is an exciting and interesting day.、As a matter of fact, apart from teenagers programmes and children's cartoons, there is not much to watch, and this is not going to teach you many things about life!
trigger_lemmas: i think、be going to、not going to
keywords: 预测,将来时,be going to,动词原形,主观看法

content: Guideword: USE: PLANS IN THE PAST. CanDo: Can use the past form of 'be going to' (often followed by 'but') to talk about a plan, sometimes one that may have changed.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future with be going to
chinese_human_name: 过去计划表达：was/were going to
examples: We were going to get married two months ago but we broke up and I really didn't know why.、We were going to have a cup of coffee on Tuesday morning, do you remember?
keywords: 过去计划,was going to,were going to,but连接,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: FUTURE ARRANGEMENTS. CanDo: Can use the present continuous with an increasing range of verbs to talk about future arrangements.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: present continuous for future use
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时表示将来安排：be + V-ing
examples: I’m attending my grandmother’s funeral tomorrow.、We’re expecting a child very soon.、The movie is starting at 8 o’clock.
keywords: 现在进行时,将来安排,时间状语,固定搭配,动词-ing

content: Guideword: USE: QUESTIONS ABOUT THE FUTURE. CanDo: Can use the present continuous with an increasing range of verbs to ask about future plans.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: present continuous for future use
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时表将来：询问未来计划
examples: Are you visiting my country on your next holiday?、Why are you moving to a different area?
trigger_lemmas: are you visiting、are you moving、are you going、are you coming
keywords: 现在进行时,未来计划,疑问句,时间状语,动词-ing

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'AS SOON AS'. CanDo: Can use the present simple with 'as soon as' to refer to the future.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: present simple for future use
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时表将来：与'as soon as'连用
examples: I'm planning to move as soon as I finish college because job opportunities in my area aren't good.、I will let you know as soon as I get the exact date.
keywords: 一般现在时,时间状语从句,将来时间,立即性,条件句

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: FRONTING, ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use adverbs in the front position for focus.
chinese_human_name: 副词前置：用于强调的句首位置
examples: That's my diary, the dearest thing I had. Here I wrote how I felt, what I did, who I met and all my problems.、Quickly I opened the envelope, took out a white piece of paper and started to read.、Suddenly, the door opened.、Outside, it wasn't a sunny day any longer, it was raining a lot.
keywords: 副词前置,句首位置,强调焦点,时间副词,方式副词,地点副词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IT' + 'BE' ADJECTIVE + 'THAT' CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'it' + 'be' + adjective + 'that-'clause for focus.
chinese_human_name: 强调句型：It + be + 形容词 + that从句
examples: It's great that you have got a new job!、It's true that there are one or two programmes that are interesting or funny, but the rest... they're horrible!、It’s important that you are happy.、It is really sad that you have to move to a different area.
keywords: 形式主语,that从句,强调句型,情感表达,评价形容词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: ORGANISING, ADDING. CanDo: Can use a range of words and phrases as discourse markers to add information.
category: SuperCategory: DISCOURSE MARKERS. SubCategory: discourse markers in writing
chinese_human_name: 写作语篇标记词：添加信息类（moreover, in addition, besides, what is more, furthermore）
examples: Moreover the health of our staff and customers is essential.、In addition it is wonderful to see the prize that the winner gets at the end, sometimes it is money or a nice holiday.、Besides, you're 18 years old and you aren't a baby.、What is more, you could go to "Estadio Centerano" to watch football matches and to Maroias to go horseriding.、Furthermore, I think that you should do some small exercises during your break, for example you could go running in the morning and evening.
keywords: 语篇标记词,添加信息,逻辑连接,正式写作,逗号使用

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: ORGANISING, MARKING NEW KNOWLEDGE, INFORMAL. CanDo: Can use 'you see', 'the thing is' as discourse markers to mark new knowledge, usually in informal contexts.
category: SuperCategory: DISCOURSE MARKERS. SubCategory: discourse markers in writing
chinese_human_name: 话语标记语：you see和the thing is（用于引出新信息）
examples: You see, in the park, you can enjoy fresh air…、The thing is, if I could move I'd go to the countryside.
keywords: 话语标记语,非正式语境,引出新信息,you see,the thing is

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: SEQUENCING. CanDo: Can use sequencing adverbs as discourse markers to organise text.
category: SuperCategory: DISCOURSE MARKERS. SubCategory: discourse markers in writing
chinese_human_name: 写作中的序列副词：firstly, secondly, finally等
examples: Firstly, we need a good expert to run the course. Secondly, good materials are needed.、… Secondly, I know you like a healthy life so if you don't eat too much candy and unhealthy food, you can keep fit easily. And lastly, please believe in yourself, I know you can do it, and don't give up the exercise…、Finally, I would be grateful if you would arrange a car from this airport.、First of all, I must tell you that it always depends on how badly you want to do something.
keywords: 序列副词,语篇标记词,写作组织,逻辑连贯,列举顺序

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: ORGANISING, CONTRASTING. CanDo: Can use a range of phrases as discourse markers to introduce contrasting statements.
category: SuperCategory: DISCOURSE MARKERS. SubCategory: discourse markers in writing
chinese_human_name: 写作中的话语标记：对比类短语（如on the one hand...on the other hand）
examples: On the one hand going to a large school is better for making friends, but on the other hand I think you can learn better in a small school.、My new teacher, on the contrary, understands us and I think she is skilful, because during the first lesson she organised a game.
trigger_lemmas: on the one hand、on the other hand、on the contrary、in contrast
keywords: 话语标记,对比,on the one hand,on the other hand,on the contrary

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: ADVERBS, STANCE. CanDo: Can use adverbs as discourse markers to indicate an attitude or viewpoint.
category: SuperCategory: DISCOURSE MARKERS. SubCategory: discourse markers in writing
chinese_human_name: 副词作为话语标记：表达态度与观点
examples: Unfortunately, they filmed only the building and the garden, not the students!、Actually, I do not have much time to watch television.、Surprisingly, the suitcase was Lucy's.
keywords: 副词,话语标记,态度,观点,句首逗号

content: Guideword: FORM: PREPOSITION + NO ARTICLE. CanDo: Can use no article before an increasing range of nouns in some fixed expressions with prepositions.
chinese_human_name: 介词后不加冠词的固定表达
examples: The weather is very cold at night.、This programme will be shown on television next Friday.
keywords: 介词,零冠词,固定表达,抽象名词,习惯用法

content: Guideword: USE: ONE MORE (WITH 'ANOTHER'). CanDo: Can use 'another' to talk about something additional.
chinese_human_name: 限定词another：表示“另一个/再一个”的用法
examples: Dear Mary, I spent a week in Dubai and I am going to spend another week in Al Ain.、In 'Master' they've got excellent pasta, which is another reason why I love the restaurant.
keywords: 限定词,可数名词,单数形式,数量补充,同类事物

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NO ARTICLE. CanDo: Can use no article before an increasing range of singular and plural nouns when referring to things in general.
chinese_human_name: 泛指名词前不加冠词：education, friends, shopping等
examples: Education in the future will change in a good way.、But remember this: friends are important, but they are not for life. Your family will always be there to support you.、Yes, sometimes I like shopping for clothes.
keywords: 泛指,抽象名词,复数名词,不加冠词,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: 'ANOTHER' |. CanDo: Can use 'another' with singular nouns. ► pronouns ► determiners
chinese_human_name: 限定词another的用法：与单数名词搭配
examples: Every 5 minutes, he makes another great joke.、Maria cried, but after a few minutes, she dried her tears and said: "Tomorrow will be another day!
keywords: another,单数名词,限定词,可数名词,另一个

content: Guideword: USE: DIFFERENT (WITH 'ANOTHER'). CanDo: Can use 'another' to talk about something different.
chinese_human_name: 限定词another的用法：表示“另一个/不同的”
examples: I'm sorry but I won't be able to go to the English class tomorrow because I'll go to Maldonado to see my mother that is ill. But I can go another day to cover the work I've missed.、Personally I think that it is better to stay at another hotel such as a Holiday Inn.
keywords: 限定词,another,单数可数名词,替代,不同

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THE OTHER'. CanDo: Can use 'the other' with a singular noun to refer to the second or the opposite of two things, and with a plural noun to refer to one of a set of things. ► pronouns ►  noun phrases
chinese_human_name: 限定词：'the other'的用法（单数与复数名词）
examples: She saw his blue jacket in a shop on the other side of the street.、I moved to this house because the other house was very small, and my brother and I have to share a bedroom.、We need a new distribution company, because the other companies are very expensive.、In the first lesson we did some games in English, so I met all the other people in the class.
trigger_lemmas: the other side、the other day、the other people、the other companies
keywords: the other,限定词,特指,单数名词,复数名词,对立面,其他部分

content: Guideword: USE: 'THIS', PAST. CanDo: Can use 'this' with time and date words to refer to the past.
chinese_human_name: 指示词'this'的过去时间用法：this morning/this summer等
examples: Hi Mark, Thank you for your lovely letter which I received this morning.、It was the best decision I've ever made. It happened this summer.
keywords: 指示词,this,过去时间,时间参照,非正式用法

content: Guideword: FORM: IRREGULAR PLURAL NOUN + ''S'. CanDo: Can use ''s' after irregular plural nouns to indicate possession.
chinese_human_name: 不规则复数名词所有格：'s的用法
examples: When I go out with my friends, I actually like wearing clothes that attract people's attention.、The second reason is: it is too far from the children's school and, unfortunately, I haven't got a car.
keywords: 不规则复数名词,所有格,'s,children,people

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THEIR'. CanDo: Can use possessive determiner 'their'. ► noun phrases ► possessive pronouns
chinese_human_name: 物主限定词：their的用法
examples: They were having the time of their lives, watching all the animals the zoo had, but when they returned to their car, they saw that someone was stealing Paul's suitcase.、They filmed the artists and their work.、I couldn't see their faces.
keywords: 物主限定词,复数第三人称,所有格,their与theirs区别,名词修饰

content: Guideword: FORM: DETERMINER + 'OF' + DETERMINER. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of quantifying determiners + 'of' + determiner ('half of', 'enough of', 'none of',).► pronouns
chinese_human_name: 数量限定词+of+限定词结构：half of, enough of, none of等
examples: In my opinion you should spend half of your holiday with your parents and the other half with your friends: I think this would be the best thing to do.、Anyway that's enough of my news!、Although I knew which kind of dress I wanted, none of the stores had it.
keywords: 数量限定词,of结构,half of,enough of,none of

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH PLURAL AND UNCOUNTABLE NOUNS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of quantifying determiners with both plural nouns and uncountable nouns ('most', 'enough', 'plenty of', 'loads of').
chinese_human_name: 数量限定词：most, enough, plenty of, loads of 与复数名词和不可数名词的搭配
examples: I'm convinced that most people watch too much TV these days.、If you haven't got enough credit on your phone, we can meet at 11 am at the bookshop.、I think if we meet at 8 pm, we'll have plenty of time to buy the tickets and some drinks.、We went to loads of beautiful places.
keywords: 数量限定词,复数名词,不可数名词,most,enough,plenty of,loads of

content: Guideword: FORM: 'SO MUCH', 'TOO MUCH' WITH UNCOUNTABLE NOUNS. CanDo: Can use 'so much' and 'too much' with uncountable nouns.
chinese_human_name: 不可数名词的强调与过量表达：so much 和 too much
examples: Hello Marina. Unfortunately I have so much work at the moment that I can't help you.、My neighbours are making too much noise.
keywords: 不可数名词,so much,too much,数量表达,负面语气

content: Guideword: FORM: 'MUCH' WITH UNCOUNTABLE NOUNS, INTERROGATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'much' with uncountable nouns in interrogative contexts.
chinese_human_name: 疑问句中的不可数名词数量询问：much的用法
examples: How much television do you watch?、Do you watch much TV?
keywords: much,不可数名词,疑问句,How much,数量询问

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH UNCOUNTABLE NOUNS. CanDo: Can use quantifying determiners with uncountable nouns, often in informal and/or spoken contexts ('a little', 'a bit of' and 'a little bit of').
chinese_human_name: 不可数名词的数量限定：a little, a bit of, a little bit of
examples: I went with my friends so we could spend a little time together.、I had a bit of free time, so I took the bus and I went to my friend's house.、I just watch a little bit of TV when I come home from school.
trigger_lemmas: a little、a bit of、a little bit of
keywords: 不可数名词,数量限定词,a little,a bit of,a little bit of,口语表达,少量

content: Guideword: FORM: 'MANY' WITH PLURAL NOUNS, INTERROGATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'many' with plural nouns in interrogative contexts.
chinese_human_name: 疑问句中的'many'与复数名词搭配用法
examples: Have you got many friends in England?、[talking about TV] How many channels are there in Britain?
keywords: many,复数名词,疑问句,how many,数量询问

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH PLURAL NOUNS. CanDo: Can use a wide range of quantifying determiners with plural nouns ('several', 'millions of', 'a few of').
chinese_human_name: 数量限定词与复数名词搭配：several, millions of, a few of
examples: So several days ago we received a complaint.、I took it and wished to have millions of dollars.、They interviewed a few of the students, the teachers and the headmistress.
keywords: 数量限定词,复数名词,several,millions of,a few of

content: Guideword: FORM: MODIFYING. CanDo: Can modify determiners with adverbs. ► adverbs
chinese_human_name: 数量限定词修饰：副词修饰限定词
examples: Because almost all of the programmes are stupid.、His name is Richard and since we were just little kids, we've spent nearly every day together.
trigger_lemmas: almost all、nearly every、just a few、only some
keywords: 副词修饰,数量限定词,almost all,nearly every,词序固定

content: Guideword: FORM: 'EITHER … OR'. CanDo: Can use 'either … or' to connect two words, phrases or clauses.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词：either … or（二选一结构）
examples: The men wear suits, either white or black, and the bride and women wear special long dresses, usually the same colour.、We can go either to the beach or to the inner part of Uruguay which is mainly a huge meadow.、I'll either write or phone you soon.、You can either go to the gym or attend some special classes, where you do gentle exercises.
keywords: 并列连词,二选一,语法平行,选择结构,替代选项

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'PLUS' WITH CLAUSES. CanDo: Can use 'plus' to connect clauses and sentences, often to point out a positive addition or advantage.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词plus：连接句子表示积极补充
examples: I would be more than pleased to receive you at home, it's not too big, but we could have a lot of fun, plus you won't have to pay a thing!、It's around 200 so it's pretty cheap for a good game. Plus, it's really addictive and fun!、It will be fun because everyone is going to be there. Plus, the park is the best place for a picnic, we can run and just have fun!
keywords: 并列连词,积极补充,非正式语气,句子连接,优势说明

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPLEX ADDING. CanDo: Can use a range of conjunctions ('and, but, or, so, then') to combine more complex strings of clauses and sentences.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词复杂添加：and, but, or, so, then的多从句连接
examples: I was scared and closed the window, but I couldn't sleep, so a few minutes later I opened the window again, but they were gone.、Then we went to his limousine and we went to his studio and he was singing "Thriller" then I heard a strange voice, I woke up, and there was my mom waking me up.
keywords: 并列连词,复杂连接,逻辑关系,结构平行,复合句

content: Guideword: FORM: 'PLUS' WITH NOUNS. CanDo: Can use 'plus' as coordinating conjunction, often in relation to numbers.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词plus：用于连接名词，常与数字相关
examples: In my house we are six people, my mother, my father, my sister and my two brothers, plus my two cats, which are members of the family too.、It cost me £2,500 plus the taxes.、At the moment I pay 550 pounds monthly plus bills.
keywords: 并列连词,plus,连接名词,数字相关,额外添加

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'BOTH … AND' WITH NOUNS. CanDo: Can use 'both … and' to combine noun phrases, to give emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词：both … and 连接名词短语
examples: I felt sorry for you because both friends and family are very important and having to pick one is very hard.、As a result of our aggressive and successful expansion strategy, both our market share and the number of our staff are increasing tremendously.、Argentina has both wonderful country landscapes and excellent towns to enjoy.
trigger_lemmas: both、and、friends and family、market share and staff
keywords: 并列连词,名词短语,强调,复数动词,平行结构

content: Guideword: FORM: SIMPLE. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of simple subordinating conjunctions ('as, after, before since, until, although, whether, so (that), though') to introduce a subordinate clause.
chinese_human_name: 简单从属连词：as, after, before, since, until, although, whether, so (that), though
examples: In fact, I have to buy a desk, as I don't have one.、I usually read during the afternoon after I have finished my homework.、Before going out in the centre, we went to a pub in order to eat something together, but I didn't see my boyfriend because he stayed at home.、I haven't seen him since we were at school.、I'm really sorry that I'm not available to attend this since I'll be in China for an important meeting with a customer.、But I didn't remember my ring until I got back home.、Although the holiday was fantastic, I wished that you were with us.、My parents also want me to go on holiday with them this summer, although I want to stay with my friends.、There were lots of people waiting for us though we had never met them before.、You gave it to me so that I could fix it!
keywords: 从属连词,从句,逻辑关系,复合句,时间连接词

content: Guideword: FORM: FINITE AFTER 'THAN'. CanDo: Can use 'than' + a finite clause forming the second part of a comparison after a comparative adjective
chinese_human_name: 比较级后接'than'引导的限定性从句
examples: I wish our schools could become better than they are. (Georgia (Republic of); B1 THRESHOLD; 2007; Georgian; Pass)、He is almost 60 years old, but he's faster than you can imagine.、The price of the delivery company we are now using is a little bit higher than we expected.、The floor is dark but the walls are white, so the room seems to be bigger than it is really.
keywords: 比较级,than,限定性从句,形容词,对比

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NON-FINITE AFTER 'THAN'. CanDo: Can use 'than' + a limited range of non-finite clauses (with -ing), forming the second part of a comparison after a comparative adjective
chinese_human_name: 比较级后接than + -ing非谓语从句
examples: Well, If I were you I would go to a small school in the countryside because it's less complicated than going to a large school in a town.、But if they refuse, you should go with your friends, because it will be more interesting than spending your holiday with parents.、Going away with friends will be more fun than sitting at home, so you should go with them.
keywords: 比较级,than,-ing形式,非谓语从句,动名词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'RATHER THAN' + PHRASE. CanDo: Can use 'rather than' + noun phrase or prepositional phrase to stress one element in a comparison.
chinese_human_name: 比较结构：'rather than' + 短语的用法
examples: Use the stairs rather than the lift, the bike rather than the tube and whenever you've got enough time, try running around the neighbourhood in the morning before going to work.、Well, to me, it's better going to a large school, rather than a small one.、Eat healthy foods rather than fatty foods.
keywords: rather than,比较结构,名词短语,介词短语,强调选择

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'AS … AS'. CanDo: Can use '(not) as' + adjective/adverb + 'as' to introduce a clause (often with a substitute auxiliary verb) to talk about two things being equal or unequal in some way.
chinese_human_name: 比较结构：'AS … AS' 同级比较句型
examples: When I come back from the hospital, I will try to cover the work as much as I can.、The weather is the best, it is not as cold as I expected, it is just perfect.、Now I've bought a computer and I'm not watching T.V. as often as I did. (Georgia (Republic of); B1 THRESHOLD; 2007; Georgian; Pass)、I really don't like trousers as much as you do.
trigger_lemmas: as much as、as often as、not as、as good as
keywords: 同级比较,形容词原级,副词原级,比较从句,替代助动词

content: Guideword: FORM: 'TOO' + 'TO'-INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use 'too' + adjective + 'to'-infinitive.
chinese_human_name: 比较结构：'too + 形容词 + to-不定式' 表示『太……而不能』
examples: First of all, I think you are too young to go on holiday by yourself.、He always told me that he was too busy to write a letter to me.
trigger_lemmas: too young to、too busy to、too tired to、too difficult to
keywords: too,形容词,to-不定式,比较结构,否定含义

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THE BEST (THAT)'. CanDo: Can use 'the best (that)' followed by a clause with the present perfect to talk about something unique.
chinese_human_name: 比较级最高级结构：'the best (that)' + 现在完成时从句
examples: It's the best place that I have ever seen.、Well, the best decision that I've ever made was the decision to go to France for a year.、I think that's why this was the best decision I've ever made.
trigger_lemmas: the best that、the best decision、the best place、the best experience
keywords: 最高级,现在完成时,关系从句,比较结构,独特体验

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THE SAME' (+ NOUN) + 'AS' + PRONOUN OR NOUN. CanDo: Can use 'the same' (+ noun) + 'as' + pronoun or noun.
chinese_human_name: 比较结构：'the same' (+名词) + 'as' + 代词或名词
examples: I wasn't the only one in my class, there were many others at the same level as me.、In my opinion it's better to be with people who are the same age as you.、You like the same things as your friends.、When I read your letter, it reminded me of a problem I had … and which was almost the same as yours.
trigger_lemmas: the same、the same as、same age、same level
keywords: the same,as,比较结构,代词,名词

content: Guideword: FORM: 'SO' + ADJECTIVE + 'THAT' CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'so' + adjective + 'that' clause.
chinese_human_name: 结果状语从句：so + 形容词 + that 从句
examples: I was so tired that I didn't have the strength to stand up and ask him for a photograph.、I was so nervous that when the teacher talked to me, I shouted to answer him!
trigger_lemmas: so tired that、so nervous that、so happy that、so excited that
keywords: so,形容词,that 从句,结果状语从句,程度强调

content: Guideword: FORM: SENSE VERBS + 'AS IF' OR 'AS THOUGH' + FINITE CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use verbs of the senses + 'as if' or 'as though' + finite clause.
chinese_human_name: 感官动词 + 'as if'/'as though' + 限定从句
examples: I was excited and I felt as if I was a bird.、So when you enter the restaurant you feel as if you are in Italy.、I think I will have to buy an umbrella because it looks as if it'll rain.、I got your letter last Friday, and it looks as if you've got a problem.、I enjoyed it a lot because as it was built many years ago. I felt as though I was in the year 1830!
trigger_lemmas: feel as if、look as if、sound as if、as though
keywords: 感官动词,as if,as though,限定从句,主观感受

content: Guideword: FORM: LINKING VERB + 'LIKE' OR 'SIMILAR TO'. CanDo: Can use linking verbs + 'like' or 'similar to'.
chinese_human_name: 系动词+like/similar to：描述相似性的表达方式
examples: Some people have told me that I look like a pop star when I wear it.、First he heard a disconcerting noise that sounded like a gun shot and then he saw a man running away holding a gun.、It smelled like roses.、Everything seemed tiny and small from above and I felt like a bird.、Your story is similar to my last dream.、The weather is sunny and hot, it's similar to Valencia's weather.
trigger_lemmas: look like、sound like、smell like、feel like、seem like、be similar to
keywords: 系动词,like,similar to,相似性,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: COMBINING CLAUSES OF THE SAME TYPE. CanDo: Can combine clauses of the same type, main or subordinate, finite or non-finite, with conjunctions.
chinese_human_name: 并列从句连接：用连词组合相同类型的从句
examples: You will have a great time with your friends, because I know they are going to the seaside and staying in a hotel near the sea. (Georgia (Republic of); B1 THRESHOLD; 2008; Georgian; Pass)、They chose our school because it's very modern and there are a lot of students.、Otherwise, if you want to relax and see your friend, the countryside will be the best.、You asked for my advice about either going on holiday with your parents or staying with your friends. (Italy; B1 THRESHOLD; 2008; Italian; Pass
keywords: 并列从句,连词,从句类型,复合句,逻辑关系

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: MULTIPLE MAIN CLAUSES, NARRATIVE. CanDo: Can combine multiple main clauses with a range of conjunctions, often in a narrative context.
chinese_human_name: 并列主句连接：叙事中的多主句组合
examples: By the time his mother arrived home, the suitcase was still lost, so Larry decided to tell her the truth, but then his mother showed him his suitcase and told Larry that he left it in the car.、If you want to go somewhere with your friends then do it and promise your parents that you will go with them the next holidays, or arrange a family day with them, because then your parents will know that you love them and that they are still very important to you.
keywords: 并列主句,连词,叙事,独立主句,标点规则

content: Guideword: FORM: 'EITHER … OR'. CanDo: Can combine two main clauses of the same type using 'either' in front or mid position, followed by 'or' to introduce the second clause.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词结构：either ... or
examples: Regarding your future plans, we would like to know which city you are going to move to, so that if we get the chance, we can either visit you or write to you.、In my opinion, you should either ask your parents if you can invite a few friends, or ask them to share your holidays.、You can either go to the gym or attend some special classes where you get gentle exercises.、I thought: "Either I talk to her now or I won't be able to talk to her anytime!
keywords: 并列连词,选择关系,句型结构,成分一致性,主谓一致

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: AUXILIARY 'DO', FOR EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use the auxiliary verb 'do' in an affirmative declarative clause, for emphasis and affirmation.
chinese_human_name: 陈述句中助动词'do'的强调用法
examples: Yes, I do have a favorite restaurant.、I do miss you.、I do apologise for the change but I can't be there on the 28th of June.、After all, you did say that you wanted go somewhere with your friends.
keywords: 助动词do,强调语气,肯定陈述句,动词原形,情感表达

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'DO', EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use 'do' + base form of a main verb, for emphasis or in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 强调性祈使句：do + 动词原形
examples: Do write back and let me know all your news.、Do let me know your views on this.、Do follow the instructions.
keywords: 强调性祈使句,do + 动词原形,正式语境,语气加强,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: INVITATION. CanDo: Can use the imperative to make an offer or an invitation.
chinese_human_name: 祈使句：用于发出邀请或提议
examples: Come and visit us after the New Year, we've got so much to talk about.、Come and stay with us this weekend!
keywords: 祈使句,邀请,动词原形,省略主语,非正式语气

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'LET ME', FOCUS. CanDo: Can use an imperative clause with 'let me' + base form of a main verb, as a focusing device, to introduce something
chinese_human_name: 祈使句聚焦结构：let me + 动词原形
examples: Let me tell you my story.、Let me explain something.、Let me answer your question.
keywords: 祈使句,聚焦结构,动词原形,引入话题,let me

content: Guideword: FORM: 'WH-' INTERROGATIVE, SUBJECT. CanDo: Can form questions with a 'wh-' word as subject, without an auxiliary verb.
chinese_human_name: 以'wh-'疑问词作主语的疑问句
examples: What happened?、Who cares?、Who knows?
keywords: wh-疑问词,主语,助动词省略,陈述语序,时态一致

content: Guideword: FORM: INTERROGATIVE + ADVERB. CanDo: Can form interrogative clauses with an adverb in mid position, between the subject and the main verb.
chinese_human_name: 疑问句中的副词中位用法：主语与主要动词之间的副词位置
examples: Have you ever been to Marseille?、What kind of books do you usually read?、Do you still remember my best friend?
trigger_lemmas: have you ever、do you usually、do you still
keywords: 疑问句,副词中位,主语动词间,频率副词,词序规则

content: Guideword: FORM: 'WHICH', 'WHOSE'. CanDo:
chinese_human_name: 疑问从句：使用WHICH和WHOSE的特殊疑问句
keywords: 疑问词,特殊疑问句,选择疑问,所属关系,词序

content: Guideword: FORM: 'HOW' + ADJECTIVE. CanDo: Can use 'How' + adjective.
chinese_human_name: 感叹句结构：How + 形容词
examples: How exciting!、How terrible!、How amazing! This is my first flight in a hot-air balloon.
keywords: 感叹句,How,形容词,情感表达,原级

content: Guideword: FORM: 'HOW' + ADJECTIVE + CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'How' + adjective + clause.
chinese_human_name: 感叹句结构：How + 形容词 + 从句/短语
examples: How lucky you are to have visited that exhibition!、How lovely to get your letter.
keywords: How,形容词,感叹句,从句,短语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THE' + NOUN + 'WHO/THAT', FOCUS. CanDo: Can use defining relative clauses, 'the person who/that, the thing that, the (only) one who/that' as a focusing device.
chinese_human_name: 限定性关系从句：the + 名词 + who/that 强调结构
examples: The thing that was great is that the weather was really warm and it didn't rain.、The thing that I love most is going to the shops.、The person who sat next to me was her.、The person who called me was my best friend.
trigger_lemmas: the person who、the thing that、the one who、the only one that
keywords: 限定性关系从句,强调结构,关系代词,聚焦装置,the person who,the thing that

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'WHERE', PLACE. CanDo: Can use defining relative clauses with 'where' to define nouns referring to place.
chinese_human_name: 关系从句：用'where'定义地点名词
examples: The city where I live is very nice and extremely charming.、But if they are going to a place where you go every year you should go with your friends, you will have more fun.、We went to the area where I used to live when I was a child near the Highlands. (Czech Republic; B1 THRESHOLD; 2003; Czech; Pass)>
trigger_lemmas: the city where、the place where、the area where、where i live
keywords: 关系从句,where,地点名词,定义从句,地点状语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'WHEN', FOCUS. CanDo: Can use defining relative clauses with 'when' to define nouns relating to time.
chinese_human_name: 限定性关系从句：用'when'定义时间名词
examples: The day when he had to go back to Korea, I could not stop myself crying.、I really remember the day when I lost my suitcase in the airport.、I was in the class at the time when they made the movie, so you will be able to see me on TV.
trigger_lemmas: the day when、the time when、the moment when、the year when
keywords: 限定性关系从句,when,时间名词,定义从句,完整句子

content: Guideword: FORM: NON-DEFINING, OBJECT, WITH 'WHO'. CanDo: Can use a non-defining relative clause with 'who' as the object.
chinese_human_name: 非限定性定语从句：用who作宾语
examples: What I liked most was the friend I made there, a green-eyed chubby boy, who I played with till dinner time, when I had to go home.、She turned around and, she couldn't believe it, it was an old classmate Tom, who she hadn't seen for ages!
trigger_lemmas: who i met、who i played with、who i hadn't seen
keywords: 非限定性定语从句,who作宾语,逗号分隔,额外信息,人物描述

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THE REASON WHY', FOCUS. CanDo: Can use defining relative clauses with 'why' after 'reason', to give an explanation and for focus.
chinese_human_name: 定语从句：用'why'修饰'reason'解释原因
examples: The reason why I love it is that it's quite original because it's about a woman who can see ghosts.、This is the reason why we are changing our working hours.、This is the main reason why it is so famous and popular as well.
trigger_lemmas: the reason why、the main reason why、the only reason why
keywords: 定语从句,关系代词why,原因解释,焦点强调,the reason why

content: Guideword: FORM: DEFINING, OBJECT, WITH 'WHO/THAT'. CanDo: Can use a defining relative clause with 'who' or 'that' as the object.
chinese_human_name: 限定性关系从句：用who/that作宾语
examples: My friends are the people who I love most.、They filmed two actors who I don't really know arguing and kissing after it.、It was Sarah, a girl who I met in Spain on my holiday last year.、We are going with my friends Paolo and Ontorio, the guys who you met yesterday.、So I sent a letter to the school and they have sent me the details of the people that I'm going to stay with.
keywords: 限定性关系从句,关系代词,先行词,宾语位置,省略规则

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'WHOSE NAME'. CanDo: Can use defining and non-defining relative clauses with 'whose name'.
chinese_human_name: 关系从句：使用'whose name'表达所属关系
examples: We have a new employee whose name is Mary Watts.、It was a very famous football player, whose name was known all over the world.、I have many friends but I'll tell you about my best friend, whose name is Nicos.、He has got a friend whose name is Robert. (Germany; B1 THRESHOLD; 2001; German; Pass、The man whose name I can't remember, wrote a serious looking message.
trigger_lemmas: whose name is、whose name was、whose name i can't remember
keywords: 关系从句,whose,name,所属关系,定义性从句,非定义性从句

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: CONTRAST. CanDo: Can use a finite subordinate clause with conjunctions ('even though, (al)though, while if') to introduce contrast, before or after a main clause.
chinese_human_name: 从属连词引导的对比状语从句：even though, although, while if
examples: You should come with your sister even though you would rather be alone.、Even though I am currently quite busy, I will be very glad to take part in the Conference dinner.、Although he was famous, I didn't like him.、Though we are not studying at the same school now, we always keep in touch.、The main actor is my favorite actor, although I can't remember his name.、I think going on holiday with your parents won't be very much fun, while if you go with your friends you will enjoy yourself much more.
keywords: 从属连词,对比状语从句,even though,although,while if

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: REASON. CanDo: Can use a finite subordinate clause with conjunctions to introduce reasons, after a main clause.
chinese_human_name: 原因状语从句：用as/since引导的从属从句
examples: I prefer to speak on 14 July, as I have got another appointment on the next day.、I am going to be absent from my English class next week, as I am travelling to Italy.、Unfortunately I will not be able to go to your class tomorrow since I have an appointment with the doctor.、A budget of €10,000 is approved to replace our old copier machine, since it is not working properly.
keywords: 原因状语从句,从属连词,as,since,因果关系

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PURPOSE, RESULT. CanDo: Can use a finite subordinate clause with conjunctions ('so (that), in order that') to introduce purpose and result, after a main clause.
chinese_human_name: 目的与结果状语从句：so that, in order that
examples: I think it is important to write about this topic so that young students and other people who are working with business, can get some inspiration.、Could you please give me some extra exercises so that I can cover the work I missed?、Please contact me if you need accommodation so I can book it for you.、If you come, please bring your camera in order that we can take some photos.
keywords: 目的状语从句,结果状语从句,连接词,so that,in order that

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NON-FINITE WITH '-ING'. CanDo: Can use a non-finite subordinate clause with 'before' and 'after' + '-ing', before or after a main clause, to refer to time.
chinese_human_name: 时间状语从句简化：before/after + -ing形式
examples: Instead I buy books once a month and I read them in the evening before going to bed.、We can relax after working hard at school.、Before going back home we ate a hot meal in a beautiful restaurant called “Palladium”.、After having breakfast I started doing my homework.
trigger_lemmas: before going、after working、before leaving、after finishing、before starting、after having
keywords: 时间状语从句,非谓语动词,-ing形式,before,after,时间关系,简化从句

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PRESENT SIMPLE 'IF' CLAUSE + MODAL, FUTURE, POSSIBLE OUTCOME. CanDo: Can use 'if' + present simple to introduce a possible future condition, with modal verbs in the main clause, to talk about a possible result. ► modality
chinese_human_name: 条件句：if + 一般现在时 + 情态动词，表达未来可能情况
examples: I think that it would be very good if you start going to the gym or you start cycling.、I would be very glad if you come and visit us.、If you come to Brazil you can stay at my home.
keywords: 条件句,if从句,一般现在时,情态动词,可能结果

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PRESENT SIMPLE 'IF' CLAUSE + 'WILL', FUTURE, LIKELY OUTCOME (FIRST CONDITIONAL). CanDo: Can use 'if' + present simple to introduce a possible future condition, with 'will' in the main clause to talk about a likely result.
chinese_human_name: 第一类条件句：if + 一般现在时 + will 表示可能发生的未来情况
examples: I talked to my parents and I think if you tell them your reasons, they will accept it.、I'm sure your parents will be happy if you go with them.、If you live in the countryside you will see beautiful nature.
keywords: 第一类条件句,if从句,一般现在时,will,条件结果关系

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PRESENT CONTINUOUS 'IF' CLAUSE , PLANS & ADVICE. CanDo: Can use 'if' + present continuous or 'going to' to introduce a possible plan, with modal verbs or imperatives in the main clause to give advice.
chinese_human_name: 条件句：用现在进行时或'going to'表达可能计划，主句用情态动词或祈使句给出建议
examples: Billy, if you are moving you should think a lot, first you have to go and see the two schools.、However, if you are looking for fun and excitement, I would go for the city.、But if you are going to live in a town you should choose the large school.、In addition, if you are going to travel, please choose your partner very carefully.
trigger_lemmas: if you are moving、if you are looking for、if you are going to live、if you are going to travel
keywords: 条件句,现在进行时,going to,情态动词,祈使句

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IF' + PAST SIMPLE + 'WOULD', FUTURE, IMAGINED SITUATION|(SECOND CONDITIONAL). CanDo: Can form conditional subordinate clauses with 'if' + past simple, and would in the main clause, to talk about an imagined situation, often in the context of advice or opinion-giving.
chinese_human_name: 第二条件句：if + 过去式 + would，谈论想象情境
examples: Maybe it would be more fun if you went with your friends.、If you went on holiday with your friends, where would you go?、But, if I was able to move, I would like to live near the coast, because I love the sea, I like sunbathing and swimming.
keywords: 第二条件句,if从句,would,过去式,想象情境

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IF' + PAST PERFECT + 'WOULD HAVE' + '-ED', IMAGINED SITUATION, REGRET|(THIRD CONDITIONAL). CanDo: Can form conditional subordinate clauses with 'if' + past perfect simple and 'would have' + '-ed' in the main clause, to talk about imagined situations in the past, often with regret.
chinese_human_name: 第三条件句：if + 过去完成时 + would have + 过去分词
examples: If they had not been there, I would have been very lonely.、If I hadn't gone to these horse-riding lessons, I wouldn't have lost my watch.、I realise that if I hadn't agreed with my parents to go to the concert I wouldn't have met Britney Spears.
trigger_lemmas: if i had、if we had、if it had、would have
keywords: 第三条件句,过去完成时,would have,假设语气,遗憾表达

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IF' + PAST SIMPLE + 'COULD', FUTURE, IMAGINED SITUATION. CanDo: Can form conditional subordinate clauses with 'if' + past simple, and 'could' in the main clause to talk about an imagined situation, often in the context of suggesting.
chinese_human_name: 条件从句：if + 一般过去时 + could 表达想象建议
examples: If you wanted to do some outdoor activities, we could go fishing or even walking through the green fields.、If you arrived in town the day before, we could arrange accommodation for you at the nearest Hotel.
trigger_lemmas: if you wanted、if you arrived、if you needed、we could
keywords: 条件从句,假设语气,礼貌建议,could可能性,一般过去时

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IF I WERE YOU' + 'WOULD', FUTURE, IMAGINED SITUATION. CanDo: Can use 'if I were you' and 'would' in the main clause often in the context of advice or opinion-giving.
chinese_human_name: 条件句：'If I were you' + 'would' 表达建议或意见
examples: Well, if I were you I would go to a small school in the countryside because it's less complicated than going to a large school in a town.、If I were you, I would talk to everybody and tell them when are you free, and spend the summer with both friends and parents.、[deciding between two holiday options] If I were you, I would accept both of them.
keywords: 条件句,虚拟语气,建议表达,would,if I were you

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'UNLESS', EXCEPTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'unless' + present simple to talk about an exception, with present and future reference.
chinese_human_name: 条件句中的例外表达：unless + 一般现在时
examples: I think I am going to pay by cash, unless you accept credit cards.、If I were you I'd go to work on foot, unless it's far away from your house.、But unless you do some sports activities you will gain a lot of weight.
keywords: unless,条件句,例外,一般现在时,if not

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: ELLIPTED 'IF NOT', ALTERNATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'If not' as a conditional clause to offer an alternative to refer to a previous direct or indirect 'yes-no' question where the answer might be ‘no’.
chinese_human_name: 条件从句：省略if的'If not'替代用法
examples: Is the Sheraton Hotel ok for you? If not, call me as soon as possible.、Do you work on Sundays? If not, you could do exercise on Sundays.、I hope it's ok for you. If not, call me on my mobile phone.
keywords: 条件从句,省略形式,替代方案,是/否疑问句,日常对话

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: ELLIPTED 'IF SO', CONFIRMING. CanDo: Can use 'If so' as a conditional clause to refer a previous direct or indirect 'yes-no' question where the answer might be ‘yes’. ► Clauses coordinated
chinese_human_name: 条件从句：省略if的'If so'用法（用于确认性提问）
examples: Do you think we could have an extra class? If so, I'd like to do it to cover the work I'll miss.、Is it possible to pay by credit card? If so, which ones do you take?
keywords: 条件从句,省略if,确认性提问,是/否问句,逻辑连贯

content: Guideword: USE: TIME. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of adverbs to refer to the timing of an event.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 时间副词与副词短语：事件时间表达
examples: Dear Kate, I went to the cinema with a new friend recently.、I immediately called her to see if everything was O.K.
keywords: 时间副词,副词短语,事件时间,句末位置,句首强调

content: Guideword: USE: MANNER. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of manner adverbs and adverb phrases to modify how something happens.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 方式副词及副词短语：描述动作如何发生
examples: They are like my sisters. We go everywhere together.、You are a sweet and caring guy and wherever you'll go, you'll fit in easily!、Of course you have to eat carefully.、Then I took a knife and opened it very carfully and slowly like there was something breakable in it.
keywords: 方式副词,副词短语,修饰动词,动作方式,位置规则

content: Guideword: USE: PLACE. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of adverbs and adverb phrases ('near', 'far away', 'upstairs', 'downstairs') to indicate place.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 地点副词及副词短语：near, far away, upstairs, downstairs等
examples: You can't go far away because I don't think your parents want to pay for it.、He went downstairs.、After the film we went to a shop nearby for lunch and after that we went to a park and played all sorts of games.
keywords: 地点副词,副词短语,位置描述,相对距离,动词修饰

content: Guideword: USE: DEGREE, 'REALLY REALLY'. CanDo: Can use 'really really' with verbs and adjectives for emphasis.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 程度副词重复强调：really really 的用法
examples: Oh, I really really like her very friendly and lovely smile.、I am not keen on football so, I think it is really really borring.
keywords: 程度副词,重复强调,非正式表达,情感增强,口语化

content: Guideword: USE: DEGREE WITH VERBS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of degree adverbs ('a little', 'a bit') with verbs to indicate degree or intensity. ► determiners
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 程度副词短语：a little, a bit 与动词搭配表示程度
examples: When I came to England, one year ago, I didn't know any English word, now I'm very happy because I don't speak very well but I can understand and speak a little.、I suggest you to take a little break of about one minute between hours and walk to relax a bit.、I go to bed and I read just a little bit.
keywords: 程度副词,a little,a bit,动词修饰,轻微程度

content: Guideword: USE: LINKING. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of adverbs ('therefore', 'furthermore', 'otherwise') to show a relationship between two clauses or sentences.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 连接副词：therefore、furthermore、otherwise的用法
examples: You don't like city's with a lot of people. Therefore I suggest you go to a small school in the countryside, near your new home.、I decided to join these classes because I have to improve my reading, writing and speaking in English. Furthermore I want to write my thesis in an English-speaking country next year. (Austria; B1 THRESHOLD; 2002; German; Pass).、Please let me know if you can collect it otherwise I will ask my other Turkish friend.
keywords: 连接副词,therefore,furthermore,otherwise,逻辑关系

content: Guideword: USE: FOCUS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of focusing adverbs ('particularly', 'especially') to point to or highlight something. ► adverbs: position
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 聚焦副词：particularly和especially的用法与位置
examples: I usually read in my free time but particularly in the evenings before I go to the bed.、As you know I love dolphins and all programmes about Nature and Wild life, especially the Discovery Channel.
keywords: 聚焦副词,particularly,especially,强调,副词位置

content: Guideword: USE: ORGANISING. CanDo: Can use adverbs as discourse markers to organise text.  ►  adverbs: position ►  Discourse markers
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
