chinese_human_name: 副词作为语篇标记：组织文本的逻辑连接词
examples: Firstly, I advise you to visit both schools.、Firstly, we need a good expert to run the course.、Secondly, good materials are needed.、What's more, this topic is very useful, it could offer so many professional suggestions . Finally , in my opinion, this topic is very interesting.、My boss' talk will be about the advantages and drawbacks which overseas sells bring  . Actually , he is very interested in this subject because our company is trying to expand and sell abroad.
keywords: 语篇标记,副词位置,逻辑连接,顺序副词,补充信息

content: Guideword: USE: STANCE. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of adverbs ('completely', 'obviously', 'clearly', 'actually', 'luckily', 'honestly', 'sadly', 'basically', 'obviously', 'hopefully') to indicate an attitude or viewpoint.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 表态副词：表达态度和观点的副词用法
examples: I am completely sure.、It's obviously much more fun to go on vacation with your friends, but your parents will be sad and worry about you all the time you're gone.、I am clearly a fashion victim and it's not a fault.、Actually she's my best friend I met her this year when the school started.、Luckily my cousin is now recovering of his illness and all my family is really happy.、I don't watch a lot of TV, sadly I don't have time.、Surely it depends where your family goes, and where you are going to go with your friends!
keywords: 表态副词,态度表达,句子修饰,逗号使用,情感副词

content: Guideword: USE: CERTAINTY. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of adverbs to indicate degrees of certainty.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 副词表达确定性程度：probably, certainly, definitely等
examples: [talking about a film] And it will probably be on TV next month!、If I were you I'd certainly choose not to go with your parents.、I will definitely give you the bicycle by 5.30 pm or latest by 5.45 pm.
keywords: 副词,确定性,probably,certainly,definitely,程度副词,情态动词

content: Guideword: FORM: MANNER, MODIFYING VERBS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of manner adverbs to modify verbs.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
chinese_human_name: 方式副词修饰动词：描述动作如何发生
examples: You have to choose carefully.、My smile slowly disappeared as I finished my reading.、She looked at me seriously and said "Can you sing a song right now?”
keywords: 方式副词,修饰动词,副词位置,-ly结尾,动作描述

content: Guideword: FORM: DEGREE, MODIFYING ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use a limited range of degree adverbs to modify adverbs. ► adverb phrases: form
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
chinese_human_name: 程度副词修饰副词：副词短语的构成与用法
examples: We left really early on a Friday morning.、So I couldn't wait and I opened it very carefully.
keywords: 程度副词,副词修饰,副词短语,词序,增强程度

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: MODIFYING CLAUSES, STANCE. CanDo: Can use adverbs to modify clauses and sentences to indicate stance or attitude.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
chinese_human_name: 副词修饰从句和句子：表达立场与态度
examples: But, obviously, you prefer going with your friends because you will have a better time.、Luckily, I arrived in time.、I think you should walk with a friend, otherwise it could be boring.
keywords: 副词修饰,立场表达,情感副词,逻辑关系,句子修饰

content: Guideword: FORM: ADVERB + ADVERB. CanDo: Can modify an increasing range of adverbs with other adverbs.► adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverb phrases - form
chinese_human_name: 副词短语构成：副词修饰副词
examples: We get along quite well.、It will be really big and at first you will feel lonely, but there are so many people, you can find new friends really fast.、My style is almost always the same: light blue jeans, with a shirt and my old brown boots.、The pizza is just too good.、[about a film] It came out just yesterday.
trigger_lemmas: quite well、really fast、almost always、just too good
keywords: 副词短语,副词修饰副词,程度副词,频率副词,方式副词

content: Guideword: FORM: COMBINING MORE THAN TWO ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use commas and 'and' to join more than two adjectives, after 'be'.
chinese_human_name: 系动词后连接三个及以上形容词：逗号与and的用法
examples: Her name is Cassia, she is beautiful, intelligent, funny and very reliable.、He is tall, thin and not very handsome, but he is very nice and friendly.
keywords: 形容词连接,逗号分隔,and连接,系动词后,多形容词描述

content: Guideword: FORM: COMBINING THE SAME COMPARATIVE ADJECTIVE WITH 'AND'. CanDo: Can use 'and' to repeat a comparative adjective to indicate change over time, usually after 'become' or get. ► adjectives: comparatives
chinese_human_name: 比较级形容词重复结构：用'and'连接表示逐渐变化
examples: I could see how the fire was burning the door, and the room became hotter and hotter.、I think that's a good question, because nowadays television is getting worse and worse, but there are still some good programmes.
keywords: 比较级形容词,逐渐变化,become,get,重复结构

content: Guideword: FORM: BEFORE THE NOUN. CanDo: Can use a comma to combine two adjectives used before the noun, following the usual order of adjective types.
chinese_human_name: 名词前并列形容词：用逗号连接两个形容词
examples: It was the biggest TV in the bazaar, with its huge, black screen.、My house was built in 1864. It's an old, Victorian-style house.
keywords: 形容词,逗号,名词前,形容词顺序,并列形容词

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPOUND ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use a limited range of compound adjectives ('good-looking', 'well-known')
chinese_human_name: 复合形容词：good-looking、well-known等常见组合
examples: He was tall and good-looking.、This programme is presented by "Gato Feobranto," a well-known comedy group.
keywords: 复合形容词,连字符,固定搭配,good-looking,well-known

content: Guideword: FORM: COMBINING COMPARATIVE ADJECTIVES WITH 'AND'. CanDo: Can use 'and' to join a limited range of comparative adjectives.► adjectives: comparatives
chinese_human_name: 比较级形容词并列：用'and'连接多个比较级形容词
examples: In the winter you can go to the fitness centre, there you can get stronger and fitter.、The cars will fly around the buildings like planes, and they will be faster and cheaper.
trigger_lemmas: stronger and fitter、faster and cheaper、more efficient and reliable、easier and more fun
keywords: 比较级形容词,并列连接,and,渐进变化,句型结构

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'AND'. CanDo: Can use 'and' to repeat a comparative adjective to indicate change over time, usually after 'become' or 'get'.  ► adjectives: comparatives
chinese_human_name: 比较级形容词重复结构：用'and'连接表示逐渐变化
examples: I saw everything become smaller and smaller.、I think that's a good question, because nowadays television is getting worse and worse, but there are still some good programmes.、Summer is coming. Days become longer and longer.
keywords: 比较级,逐渐变化,and连接,become,get

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH '(SO) MUCH'. CanDo: Can use '(so) much' to modify and intensify comparative adjectives used predicatively after a verb, usually 'be'.
chinese_human_name: 比较级形容词的强调用法：用‘(so) much’修饰
examples: I think the teacher in the new class is much better than the last one.、The house is beautiful, and so much bigger than the previous one.
keywords: 比较级,强调修饰,much,so much,表语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'A (LITTLE) BIT'. CanDo: Can use 'a (little) bit' to modify comparative adjectives used predicatively after a verb, usually 'be'.
chinese_human_name: 比较级修饰语：用'a (little) bit'表示'稍微/一点儿'
examples: He's 15, a bit smaller than me, dark hair, brown eyes.、Our first lesson was a bit shorter, but very unusual.、She's a little bit older than me.
keywords: 比较级,修饰语,a bit,a little bit,than

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'EVEN'. CanDo: Can use 'even' to modify and intensify comparative adjectives used predicatively after a verb, usually 'be' and 'get'.
chinese_human_name: 比较级形容词的强调用法：用 'even' 加强比较程度
examples: [talking about a series of films] I'm sure you've seen part one already, but part two was even better!、As I finished, my smile got even bigger.、I think that it is awful, because that means that in Spain it will be even hotter than it is now.
keywords: even,比较级形容词,强调,表语,程度加强

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'TOO' + 'TO'-INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use 'too' before adjectives followed by 'to'-infinitive.
chinese_human_name: 形容词修饰：'too + 形容词 + to-不定式'结构
examples: He always told me that he was too busy to write a letter to me, his wife.、We took two days to mend it, but the machine is too old to work well.
trigger_lemmas: too busy to、too old to、too tired to、too difficult to
keywords: too,形容词,不定式,程度过度,无法完成

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'ENOUGH'. CanDo: Can use 'enough' to modify adjectives.
chinese_human_name: 形容词修饰：enough的用法
examples: My room is big enough, there is a lot of space, and for this reason I will buy a stereo.、I thought they had the same problem as me: we don't think our English is good enough.
keywords: enough,形容词修饰,程度表达,足够,to do不定式

content: Guideword: FORM: ADJECTIVE PHRASE + NOUN. CanDo: Can use adjective phrases attributively, before a noun.
chinese_human_name: 形容词短语前置修饰名词：形容词短语+名词结构
examples: … my boss told me that at 10.15 am I have a very important meeting.、… she's also a really good friend.
keywords: 形容词短语,前置修饰,定语,名词修饰,词序

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'QUITE A'. CanDo: Can form adjective phrases with 'quite a' + adjective.
chinese_human_name: 形容词短语：quite a + 形容词
examples: I been thinking about your last letter for quite a long time and I came to the following conclusion.、This is quite a difficult situation you have.、I personally think going to a large school is quite a good idea.
trigger_lemmas: quite a、quite a long、quite a good、quite a difficult
keywords: quite a,形容词短语,修饰,程度强调,固定结构

content: Guideword: FORM: ADJECTIVES WITH PREFIX 'A-'. CanDo: Can use adjectives with the prefix a- ('asleep', 'awake', 'alive', 'alone') predicatively only, after linking verbs.
chinese_human_name: 以a-为前缀的形容词：只能作表语使用
examples: I was very nervious because I was  alone at the bus station …、On that night while I was watching TV, I was almost  asleep , the door bell rang.、We went in the room and I was very happy that my father was still  alive.
keywords: a-前缀形容词,表语,系动词,状态描述,不可作定语

content:
Guideword: FORM: ATTRIBUTIVE (WITH NOUNS). CanDo: Can use an increasing range of adjectives attributively, before a noun.
► noun phrases
chinese_human_name: 形容词作定语：名词前的形容词用法
examples: The main character in the programme is a journalist who is visiting the town.、Dear Fiona, I see you are in a complicated situation, aren't you?、The first of them had long dark hair and the second one had short fair curly hair.、In the evening, we used to go to a famous restaurant where you can eat delicious local food.、I decided to see the "Zorro's Mask" because it's an amusing and entertaining action film and love-story.
trigger_lemmas: main character、complicated situation、long dark hair、delicious local food
keywords: 形容词作定语,名词修饰,词序规则,attributive adjectives,noun phrases

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'MAKE' AS OBJECT COMPLEMENT. CanDo: Can use adjectives as object complement after 'make'.
chinese_human_name: 形容词作宾语补足语：与make搭配的用法
examples: That's something that makes me angry!、… you should tell them that you don't want to make them sad but you really want to go on holiday with your friends.、Maria realised that being kind and trying to make other people happy is always the best way!
keywords: 形容词,宾语补足语,make,情感表达,状态变化

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH PRONOUN. CanDo: Can use an adjective or adjective phrase after pronouns like 'something', 'nothing', 'somewhere', 'nowhere'.
chinese_human_name: 代词后置形容词：something special, nothing interesting
examples: I like cooking and I want to cook something special.、But something terrible happened next; I was so nervous that I stopped breathing!、There is nothing interesting on TV, nothing for teenagers.
keywords: 代词后置形容词,不定代词,形容词短语,词序,修饰

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: COMPLEX NOUN PHRASES. CanDo: Can form an increasing range of complex noun phrases with a superlative adjective + prepositional phrase, to talk about something unique. ► noun phrases
chinese_human_name: 最高级形容词+介词短语构成的复杂名词短语
examples: Yesterday was the most exciting day of my life!、Well, exercise is undoubtedly the most important thing in our lives for our health.
trigger_lemmas: the most exciting day of、the most important thing in、the best player on、the tallest building in
keywords: 最高级形容词,介词短语,复杂名词短语,唯一性,范围限定

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THE BEST' WITH NOUN AND PRESENT PERFECT. CanDo: Can use 'the best' before a noun + present perfect to talk about a unique experience.
chinese_human_name: 最高级搭配：'the best' + 名词 + 现在完成时
examples: It was the best birthday present I have ever had.、That is the best game I've ever played.
keywords: 最高级,the best,现在完成时,唯一经历,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THE BEST' WITH NOUN AND  'TO-' INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use 'the best' before a noun + 'to'-infinitive.  ► clauses: comparative
chinese_human_name: 最高级结构：'the best' + 名词 + 'to-'不定式
examples: Summer is the best time to visit Poland.、I'm sorry but I'm afraid that I'm not the best person to ask about TV, because I'm up to my eyes at work and I don't have any time to spend watching TV.
trigger_lemmas: the best time、the best person、the best way、to visit
keywords: 最高级,the best,to-不定式,名词,最佳选择

content: Guideword: FORM: 'ONE OF THE'. CanDo: Can use 'one of the' before a superlative adjective, followed by a plural noun. ► noun phrases
chinese_human_name: 形容词最高级搭配：'one of the' + 最高级形容词 + 复数名词
examples: It was one of the best days of my life.、I recommend that you should go to Akihabara, which is one of the most famous places in Tokyo.
keywords: one of the,最高级形容词,复数名词,最……之一,比较与最高级

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH DETERMINERS. CanDo: Can form noun phrases with a range of determiners before a superlative adjective. ► noun phrases
chinese_human_name: 最高级形容词前加限定词构成名词短语
examples: There, people wear their best clothes.、Tomorrow I'm expecting a delivery of our latest catalogues.
keywords: 最高级形容词,限定词,名词短语,物主代词,定冠词
